TV Series.title: The Ricky Gervais Show
TV Series.overview: Karl Pilkington shares his curious views as Ricky Gervais and Stephen Merchant riff on them hilariously in this animated adaptation of the hit podcast.

TV Series.title: Secrets
TV Series.overview: On the surface, Ariel and Greg seem to be the perfect couple. But when Greg goes missing, Ariel’s world is turned upside down and secrets come out.

TV Series.title: World War II: Race to Victory
TV Series.overview: Experience World War II through the voices of those who lived it. Veterans and civilians share raw, first-hand memories that bring history's darkest conflict to life.

TV Series.title: The Far Pavilions
TV Series.overview: An epic tale of passion, treachery, and intrigue, set in colonial India. An Englishman is torn between two cultures, fighting for the Indian princess he loves in a story rich in historical detail and spectacular scenery: Himalayan peaks, the palaces of Bhithor, and a lavish Hindu wedding.

TV Series.title: No Longer Allowed in Another World
TV Series.overview: Pulled into an otherworldly adventure with cute sidekicks and superpowers, you’d think Osamu hit the jackpot. Nope! From a time before pixels, the early 20th-century gloomy author just wants to find a quiet place to meet his maker, not to rack up XP. Sadly, his poetic demise is constantly thwarted by inconvenient heroics. Dive into the hilariously tragic life of the most reluctant hero!

TV Series.title: I'll Become a Villainess Who Goes Down in History
TV Series.overview: This young girl hates all those goodie-two-shoes heroines. So when she’s reincarnated as Alicia, the villain in her favorite fantasy dating sim, it’s like a dream come true! There’s just one problem: the more she tries to be evil, the more the prince seems to fall for her. Alicia will have to work much harder if she ever wants to become the world’s greatest villainess.

TV Series.title: Gunpowder, Treason & Plot
TV Series.overview: Expect deceit, lust and betrayal, in this calculating historical drama, leading up to the notorious gunpowder plot of 1605. Tensions rise when Mary Queen of Scots is hailed the catholic Queen, threatening the protestant Queen of England, Elizabeth I. When Mary's son succeeds to the English throne, the rivalry becomes deadly. Starring Michael Fassbender, this brutal retelling is a must watch!

TV Series.title: Hitler: The Rise of Evil
TV Series.overview: Robert Carlyle stars as the German dictator during his rise to power in this television miniseries. After spending years as a frustrated artist in Vienna, Adolf Hitler enlists in the German army during the First World War. Embittered by Germany's defeat, Hitler begins his gradual rise to power in the ranks of the newly-formed National Socialist Party.

TV Series.title: Jesus of Nazareth
TV Series.overview: From the Nativity to the Crucifixion and Resurrection, the life of Jesus is presented with stunning depth, gravity and emotion.

TV Series.title: Classic Albums
TV Series.overview: Carly Simon reveals the challenges behind No Secrets - the classic album that made her a global star and included the enigmatic song You're So Vain.

TV Series.title: Untold Stories of the ER
TV Series.overview: Dramatizations of real-life medical emergencies offer a glimpse into the frenetic, high pressure and truly gruesome business of saving lives.

TV Series.title: Halo: The Fall of Reach
TV Series.overview: Halo: The Fall of Reach follows the backstory of the shaping and creation of Spartan 117, The Master Chief.

TV Series.title: Halo 4: Forward Unto Dawn
TV Series.overview: UNSC Cadet Thomas Lasky must conquer his inner fears and join forces with super-soldier John-117 to take down a massive faction of the Covenant.

TV Series.title: The Red Road
TV Series.overview: Starring Jason Momoa (Game of Thrones), Martin Henderson (The Ring) and Julianne Nicholson (Boardwalk Empire). Lines will be crossed when tragedy forces two men, a mesmerizing ex-con and an embattled local cop, to face the secrets of their past.

TV Series.title: Dexter: New Blood
TV Series.overview: Set 10 years after Dexter went missing in the eye of Hurricane Laura, the series finds him living under an assumed name in the small town of Iron Lake, New York. Dexter may be embracing his new life, but in the wake of unexpected events in this close-knit community, his Dark Passenger beckons.

TV Series.title: Black Sails
TV Series.overview: A chronicle of the adventures of a pirate captain, his shipmates and his rivals in the early 18th-century Caribbean. The series is a prequel to Robert Louis Stevenson's "Treasure Island".

TV Series.title: Yellowjackets
TV Series.overview: A team of wildly talented high school girls soccer players who become the (un)lucky survivors of a plane crash deep in the Ontario wilderness.

TV Series.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
TV Series.overview: Three decades of relative calm are shattered when an act of stoned stupidity unleashes Deadite mayhem back into the life of braggart Ash Williams.

TV Series.title: The Affair
TV Series.overview: Just when things have stabilized for Noah and Helen, an encounter with someone from the distant past sets in motion a harrowing sequence of events. And in the future, Joanie Lockhart attempts to piece together the truth about what happened to her mother.

TV Series.title: Stan Against Evil
TV Series.overview: 172 demons have been unleashed on the residents of Williard's Mill as payback for a massive witch-burning hundreds of years ago. Evie, the lucky new sheriff in town, needs to work with the former sheriff, Stan Miller, who was forced to retire after an altercation at his wife's funeral. The only way both Evie and Stan can save the town is to find and destroy every one of the demons. The key to saving the town lies in decoding a century's old book, found in Stan's recently deceased wife's sewing room.

TV Series.title: Billions
TV Series.overview: Emmy and Golden Globe winners Paul Giamatti and Damian Lewis star in a complex drama about power politics in the world of New York high finance. Shrewd, savvy U.S. Attorney Chuck Rhoades (Giamatti) and the brilliant, ambitious hedge fund king Bobby "Axe" Axelrod (Lewis) are on an explosive collision course, with each using all of his considerable smarts, power and influence to outmaneuver the other. The stakes are in the billions in this timely, provocative series.

TV Series.title: Creepshow
TV Series.overview: From visionary writer and director, Greg Nicotero, Creepshow brings together legendary creators and the brightest new talent behind the most successful horror series and feature films on television and in theaters today.

TV Series.title: McDonald & Dodds
TV Series.overview: Wildly ambitious DCI McDonald and shy DS Dodds forge a friendship and an entertaining, effective partnership as they take on puzzling cases.

TV Series.title: Sanctuary: A Witch's Tale
TV Series.overview: Sarah Fenn, a modern-day witch, uses her powers for good, living in the town of Sanctuary. Though her daughter, Harper hasn't inherited Sarah's powers, when local teenager, Dan dies during a party, Harper is accused of killing him - by magic.

TV Series.title: True Crime Story: Smugshot
TV Series.overview: Whether in pursuit of revenge or riches, status or glory, freedom or fame, each of these law-breakers cling to their entitlement in spite of having more to lose than to gain. These are the stories of people who thought they could get away with it.

TV Series.title: Spartacus
TV Series.overview: The prequel to `Spartacus: Blood and Sand' tells the story of the original champion of the House of Batiatus, in a time when gladiators were more ruthless and every man was out for himself. While his father is away in Sicily, Batiatus gains temporary power of the house, but he isn't satisfied with the succession plan as currently constructed; he's poised to not only overthrow his father but also gain power and prestige in Capua. With his loyal and calculating wife, Lucretia, by his side, and his infamous gladiator Gannicus embracing his champion status, Batiatus' ambitious schemes have no bounds.

TV Series.title: The Good Ship Murder
TV Series.overview: An ex-copper now moonlighting as a cabaret singer on board a cruise ship finds himself solving a wave of murders alongside the ambitious, and uptight, female First Officer.

TV Series.title: Three Women
TV Series.overview: Writer Gia convinces three women to tell her their stories; entrepreneur Sloane, homemaker Lina and student Maggie are on a crash course to radically overturn their lives.

TV Series.title: The Terror
TV Series.overview: A Royal Navy ship undertakes a perilous voyage in pursuit of the Northwest Passage, but treacherous conditions, limited resources, and low morale plague the crew.

TV Series.title: After the Flood
TV Series.overview: In the aftermath of a devastating flood, an unidentified man is found dead, and PC Jo Marshall (Sophie Rundle) becomes fixated on uncovering the truth behind the man's death.

TV Series.title: Who is Ghislaine Maxwell?
TV Series.overview: As the enigmatic British socialite Ghislaine Maxwell faces trial for her role in the Jeffrey Epstein scandal, this new documentary special will ask who and what she really is.

TV Series.title: Black Snow
TV Series.overview: Detective James Cormack (Travis Fimmel) is focused on solving cold-case mysteries. He's also haunted by his personal quest to find his younger brother, who vanished when they were children.

TV Series.title: Fallen
TV Series.overview: Based on the #1 New York Times bestselling book series, this seductive supernatural thriller follows a young woman who must uncover her past, embrace her power, and choose her destiny in an epic battle of good and evil.

TV Series.title: The Dead Sea Squirrels
TV Series.overview: Ten-year-old Michael and his best buddy Justin are spending the summer in Israel along the banks of the Dead Sea. Deep inside a cave, the boys discover a couple of salt-encrusted, dehydrated squirrels. Michael smuggles the crusty critters back home to Tennessee where, after leaving them out near his bedroom window, they rehydrate and spring to life. Just how long can a fifth grader and his smal...

TV Series.title: True Crime Story: Look Into My Eyes
TV Series.overview: Look Into My Eyes unfurls the story of Dr. George Kenney, former principal of North Port High School in Florida, who hypnotized students. After three of his students die in 2011, the series unpacks what happened and how culpable Dr. K really is.

TV Series.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
TV Series.overview: Now, in Season Five, Kanan's true ruthlessness takes shape. He knows exactly who he is and who he must become to defeat his enemies.

TV Series.title: El Mochaorejas
TV Series.overview: El Mochaorejas sigue a una periodista que, entre archivos y testimonios, reconstruye el ascenso de un secuestrador legendario y la red de miedo y secretos que todavía marca a México.

TV Series.title: Midsomer Murders
TV Series.overview: Un veterano inspector jefe de detectives y su joven sargento investigan asesinatos en la comunidad regional del condado de Midsomer.

TV Series.title: True Crime Story: Citizen Detective
TV Series.overview: TRUE CRIME STORY: CITIZEN DETECTIVE is a documentary true crime series about everyday citizens solving murders. Each episode unpacks the details of the case and explores the perplexing psyches of those who simply need to know what happened and why?

TV Series.title: P-Valley
TV Series.overview: P-Valley takes an unapologetic look at the lives of strip club dancers working down in the Mississippi Delta and the big characters who come through the doors. Welcome to the Dirty South.

TV Series.title: The Son
TV Series.overview: Epic Wild West drama starring Pierce Brosnan, telling the concurrent tales of the young Eli McCullough in the 1850s and his life as the family patriarch 60 years later.

TV Series.title: Power Book II: Ghost
TV Series.overview: From Power creator Courtney A. Kemp and Curtis "50 Cent" Jackson, Power Book II: Ghost follows Tariq navigating his new life, in which his desire to shed his father's legacy comes up against the mounting pressure to save his family.

TV Series.title: FBI: International
TV Series.overview: An elite counterterrorist team travels the world with the mission of tracking and neutralizing threats against American citizens wherever they may be.

TV Series.title: Sweetpea
TV Series.overview: Rhiannon Lewis doesn't make much of an impression - people walk past her in the street without a second glance; that is until she is pushed over the edge and loses control; Rhiannon's life transforms.

TV Series.title: Power
TV Series.overview: Executive Producer Curtis "50 Cent" Jackson presents the hit drama Power, centered on a drug kingpin struggling to go from illegal to legitimate in the NYC nightlife.

TV Series.title: Riot Women
TV Series.overview: A teacher, a police officer, a publican, a midwife, and a shoplifting freeloader: five menopausal women accidentally start a punk rock band.

TV Series.title: The Couple Next Door
TV Series.overview: A young couple develop a fast friendship with their new neighbors when they move to an idyllic suburb; but the relationship soon takes some unexpected and sinister turns.

TV Series.title: The Last Anniversary
TV Series.overview: When Sophie Honeywell mysteriously inherits a house on Scribbly Gum Island, her arrival threatens to unearth secrets held close by the three generations of women who call the island home.

TV Series.title: Grey's Anatomy
TV Series.overview: The doctors face life-or-death decisions daily.

TV Series.title: Power Book IV: Force
TV Series.overview: Follows fan-favourite character Tommy Egan (Joseph Sikora) after he leaves New York and finds himself in Chicago's drug game. In a city divided by race, Tommy breaks all the rules on his quest to become the biggest drug dealer in Chicago.

TV Series.title: Young David
TV Series.overview: Before he faced Goliath and took his place in history, David was a shepherd, tending his father’s flock in the fields near Bethlehem. But even then, he had the qualities that would let him take on giants. In these five short films, we reveal the five most remarkable aspects of David: as a shepherd, a warrior, a poet, a worshipper, and a great leader. With action, music, humor, bravery, and humi...

TV Series.title: Hijack
TV Series.overview: Idris Elba is a businessman whose flight is hijacked, leading him to try using his negotiating skills to save the day.

TV Series.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet
TV Series.overview: Millions of years ago, incredible forces ripped apart the Earth's crust, creating seven extraordinary continents. Seven Worlds, One Planet, presented by Sir David Attenborough, will reveal how each distinct continent has shaped the unique animal life found there.

TV Series.title: NCIS: New Orleans
TV Series.overview: The 7th season of NCIS: NEW ORLEANS finds Pride (Scott Bakula) and the team fighting for justice in their beloved city as New Orleans grapples with the effects of COVID-19.

TV Series.title: 60 Minutes
TV Series.overview: Offering hard-hitting investigative reports, interviews, feature segments, and profiles of people in the news, the CBS News magazine has been the number-one program a record five times. It also finished among Nielsen's annual top-10 list for 23 consecutive seasons — a record never even approached by another program.

TV Series.title: Nautilus
TV Series.overview: Nemo steals a formidable prototype submarine and escapes into the Indian ocean with a ragtag crew, determined to enact revenge against the ruthless East India Mercantile Company.

TV Series.title: Remington Steele
TV Series.overview: As Laura and Remington continue to fight crime, and their growing attraction to each other, Laura catches tantalizing glimpses into her partner's mysterious and very private past.

TV Series.title: Coronation Street
TV Series.overview: The working-class residents of Coronation Street see their fair share of drama as they make their way about their daily lives.

TV Series.title: America's Culinary Cup
TV Series.overview: Created by Padma Lakshmi, AMERICA'S CULINARY CUP stars 16 of the country's most elite chefs competing in the ultimate culinary arena.

TV Series.title: Love After Lockup: Life After Lockup
TV Series.overview: Challenges, triumphs & family dramas. This rollercoaster reality spin-off revisits the 'Love after Lock Up' couples as they navigate life following their release.

TV Series.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
TV Series.overview: RuPaul leads a team of judges in the quest to find the most glamorous drag queen. From selection to judgement, RuPaul plays the part of mentor and supporter throughout the challenges.

TV Series.title: The BMF Documentary: Blowing Money Fast
TV Series.overview: “BMF: Blowing Money Fast” is a docuseries about the infamous Black Mafia Family. BMF founders and brothers: Demetrius “Big Meech” and Terry “Southwest T” Flenory built one of the largest cocaine empires in American history.

TV Series.title: Mudtown

TV Series.title: Outlander: Blood of My Blood
TV Series.overview: "Outlander: Blood of my Blood" is a romantic saga that unfolds across time. From the battlefields of World War I to the rugged Highlands of 18th century Scotland, two fated couples must defy the forces that seek to tear them apart, intersecting in surprising and unforeseen ways.

TV Series.title: Gangs of London
TV Series.overview: For 20 years, Finn Wallace was the most powerful criminal in London. But now he’s dead – and It’s up to the impulsive Sean Wallace to take his father’s place. WARNING: Contains High Impact Themes, Bloody Violence, Injury Detail and Coarse Language.

TV Series.title: Grace
TV Series.overview: The best-selling Peter James novels make it to the screen in this two-part crime drama starring John Simm (Life on Mars, Doctor Who). Haunted by the disappearance of his wife, tenacious yet troubled detective Roy Grace has a reputation for his unorthodox methods in pursuit of the truth. As he walks a career tightrope, he is assigned to a missing person case that becomes a race against time full of

TV Series.title: American Classic
TV Series.overview: Broadway star Richard Bean returns home after a public meltdown to find his family's theater in severe decline and decides only he can save it.

TV Series.title: Survivor
TV Series.overview: Stranded in the beautiful islands of Fiji, 18 determined new castaways will be divided into 3 tribes of 6 and forced to form a new society as they adapt to their physical and social surroundings.

TV Series.title: The Bondsman
TV Series.overview: Murdered bounty hunter Hub Halloran is resurrected by the Devil to trap and send back demons that have escaped from the prison of Hell. By chasing down those demons with the help and hinderance of his estranged family, Hub learns how his own sins got his soul condemned -- which pushes him to seek a second chance at life, love, and country music.

TV Series.title: The Grand Tour
TV Series.overview: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May are back with The Grand Tour. A show about adventure, excitement and friendship... as long as you accept that the people you call friends are also the ones you find extremely annoying. Sometimes it's even a show about cars. Follow them on their global adventure

TV Series.title: Outlander
TV Series.overview: After serving as a British Army nurse in World War II, Claire Randall is enjoying a second honeymoon in Scotland with husband Frank, an MI6 officer looking forward to a new career as an Oxford historian. Suddenly, Claire is transported to 1743 and into a mysterious world where her freedom and life are threatened. To survive, she marries Jamie Fraser, a strapping Scots warrior with a complicated past and a disarming sense of humor. A passionate relationship ensues, and Claire is caught between two vastly different men in two inharmonious lives. "Outlander" is adapted from the best-selling books by Diana Gabaldon.

TV Series.title: Forensic Files
TV Series.overview: Armados con las pruebas y testimonios que recaban en cada caso, los peritos de esta serie resuelven crímenes y accidentes por todo el mundo.

TV Series.title: The Man in the High Castle
TV Series.overview: In a world where Nazi Germany and Imperial Japan won WWII and control the US, a woman sees a film showing a different reality, inspiring her to resist.

TV Series.title: League of Super Evil
TV Series.overview: Four supervillains won’t stop until they achieve total neighborhood domination—regardless of how many schools, playgrounds or kids they must destroy.

TV Series.title: My Lady Jane
TV Series.overview: Are you ready for an epic tale of true love, high adventure, regicidal maniacs, deadpan heroism, devious intrigues, swashbuckling swordfights, a soupçon of magical realism and oodles of yearning, banter and undeniable chemistry? Of course you are. Welcome to My Lady Jane.

TV Series.title: Paper Giants: The Birth of Cleo
TV Series.overview: In 1972, 30-year-old journalist and editor, Ita Buttrose and 35-year-old Kerry Packer, scion of what was then Australias most ruthlessly powerful and influential publishing families, got together to create a magazine that became one of the most dramatic sensations in Australian publishing history. Cleo Magazine begun in a fit of pique went on to help define women, Australia and the relationship between the two.

TV Series.title: Animal Park
TV Series.overview: Behind the scenes at Longleat Safari Park with Ben Fogle and Kate Humble

TV Series.title: Ainsley's Caribbean Kitchen
TV Series.overview: TV Chef Ainsley Harriott takes a trip across the Caribbean visiting the islands that have inspired his cooking from an early age, on a journey through the tropical climates, exotic food and charming characters that make each island in the Caribbean unique.

TV Series.title: Bali 2002
TV Series.overview: People in Bali find hope in darkness after the island is shattered by terrorist attacks on busy nightclubs in 2002. Based on the gripping true story.

TV Series.title: The Interceptor
TV Series.overview: After 15 frustrating years of low-level drug busts, Marcus Ashton finally sees a chance to fulfil his dream of taking down the underworld's biggest players when he is recruited by the UNIT (Undercover Narcotics Intelligence Team). Using state-of-the-art surveillance, this highly skilled squad are determined in their mission to hunt down and bring to justice London's most ruthless criminals.

TV Series.title: Boyhood
TV Series.overview: Set against the vibrant yet turbulent backdrop of the mid-to-late 1980s, Byeong-tae, a small and unassuming country boy, struggles at the bottom of his school's social hierarchy. He transfers to an agricultural High School, hoping for a fresh start. However, his new life takes a dramatic turn when an unexpected event occurs.

TV Series.title: Police Rescue Australia
TV Series.overview: Australian police rescue teams risk their lives to save people from dangerous situations

TV Series.title: The Expanse
TV Series.overview: Two centuries in the future, a missing person links an asteroid belt detective, the captain of an ice freighter and a diplomat trying to avert a war.

TV Series.title: The Bionic Vet
TV Series.overview: A look inside the fascinating work of Dr. Noel Fitzpatrick, an English trailblazing veterinarian who develops surgical techniques.

TV Series.title: Robson Green: Extreme Fisherman
TV Series.overview: Robson Green travelling to eight remote global locations, In Venezuela, he attempts 'the Grand Slam', catching three different species of billfish in a single day. In Okinawa, he encounters one of the most venomous creatures in the ocean, the black-banded sea snake, before heading to Madagascar to face the awesome bull shark. Fishing trips are always epic with angling's No.1 action man.

TV Series.title: Most Haunted
TV Series.overview: Paranormal investigators visit the most haunted places on the planet, using cutting-edge technology to get hard evidence of the supernatural.

TV Series.title: Paramedics on Scene
TV Series.overview: Join Scotland's paramedics as they tackle medical emergencies across the country, delivering critical care wherever it's needed.

TV Series.title: Thicha
TV Series.overview: A young girl escapes her homeland, only to face human trafficking. Stripped of all, she crafts a new identity, driven by a singular goal: revenge.

TV Series.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive
TV Series.overview: Gripping re-enactments of true tales of survival against extraordinary odds, from dangerous elements to grueling psychological circumstances.

TV Series.title: Summer of Rockets
TV Series.overview: `Summer of Rockets' is a drama series starring Keeley Hawes, Timothy Spall and Toby Stephens, which is set in Cold War Britain during the late 1950s. The series follows Samuel, a Russian-born Jewish inventor, who is tasked with a secret mission by MI5. Samuel specialises in the development of hearing aids and is asked to use his technological expertise to contribute to western Cold War efforts. Following the tensions of the space race and the first hydrogen bomb test, Samuel's efforts factor in to the emergence of the modern world.

TV Series.title: Cape Town
TV Series.overview: A grieving police captain is assigned a new partner who rubs him the wrong way, just as they discover the grisly results of a killing spree.

TV Series.title: Impossible Peace
TV Series.overview: World War I ended, but peace lasted just 20 years. This series explores how a world scarred by war collapsed into tyranny, depression—and war again.

TV Series.title: Meet You at the Blossom
TV Series.overview: After a fateful and unexpected encounter, the son of Jiangnan's wealthiest man falls for the icy beauty Huai En, but she hides a secret.

TV Series.title: Maxton Hall – The World Between Us
TV Series.overview: When Ruby unwillingly witnesses an explosive secret at Maxton Hall Private School, arrogant millionaire heir James Beaufort is forced to confront the quick-witted scholarship student, much to his chagrin: He is determined to silence Ruby. Their passionate exchange of blows surprisingly ignites a spark ...

TV Series.title: Defending the Guilty
TV Series.overview: Will is an idealistic pupil barrister who wonders if he's got what it takes to succeed. His boss doesn't respect him, his clients are all guilty, and he's fighting for his job.

TV Series.title: Sinbad
TV Series.overview: A thrilling, modern, magical reinvention of the famous legend from the Arabian Nights. On the run from his home town of Basra and under a curse from his grandmother for a killing that led to the death of his much-loved brother, the streetwise Sinbad finds himself on an epic and emotional quest to rid himself of the curse and to embrace his destiny.

TV Series.title: Alaska: A Year in the Wild
TV Series.overview: Alaska is America’s last frontier…and greatest wilderness. Home to half the world’s glaciers, America’s highest mountains and ice sheets that stretch to the North Pole; it is rich, diverse but also hostile.

TV Series.title: Then You Run
TV Series.overview: Four young women set out on holiday in Rotterdam, but their trip gets cut short when one of them visits her estranged father, and he winds up dead.

TV Series.title: Silk
TV Series.overview: An ambitious defense barrister faces challenging cases in this sharp legal drama following the tensions and rivalries at a London law firm.

TV Series.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Monsters
TV Series.overview: Yugi Moto solves an Ancient Egyptian Puzzle and brings forth a dark and powerful alter ego. Whenever he and his friends are threatened by evil in Duel Monster Card Game, this alter ego breaks out to save them.

TV Series.title: Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
TV Series.overview: Bean is back! Join him, alongside his best friend Teddy and his long-suffering landlady, for more zany mishaps that surround his daily life.

TV Series.title: Van Helsing
TV Series.overview: In a new spin on the Dracula legend, Vanessa Helsing is resurrected to learn that she's humanity's last hope against a world controlled by vampires.

TV Series.title: Humans
TV Series.overview: A suburban family purchases a refurbished 'Synth,' a human-like robotic servant, and discovers that life with a machine is not what they expected.

TV Series.title: The Paradise
TV Series.overview: A country girl moves to the city and becomes enthralled by her new world after she takes a job at The Paradise, England's first department store.

TV Series.title: Blue Mountain State
TV Series.overview: Three new athletes on a top college football team learn the extreme high and low of being among the chosen few who are worshiped and tested on campus.

TV Series.title: I Literally Just Told You
TV Series.overview: Jimmy Carr hosts the game show where paying attention pays off, as players answer questions that have just been written, about things that have just happened during the show, in a bid to win £25,000

TV Series.title: Unspeakable
TV Series.overview: YouTube sensation Nathan Graham pulls pranks, competes in wild challenges with friends, and collaborates with YouTube stars like Preston and ZHC.

TV Series.title: Merlin
TV Series.overview: The young wizard Merlin must keep his talent hidden in a kingdom where magic is banned as he and the future King Arthur face their destinies.

TV Series.title: American Gods
TV Series.overview: Fresh out of prison, Shadow Moon meets the enigmatic Mr. Wednesday—and is swept into a gathering storm that will upend the course of his life.

TV Series.title: New Blood
TV Series.overview: Striking new drama from the writer of Magpie Murders and Foyle's War. Two rookie investigators are thrown together to tackle powerful criminals hiding in government and business.

TV Series.title: Moonshine
TV Series.overview: Moonshine is a raucous one-hour dramedy that tells the story of the Finley-Cullens, a dysfunctional family of adult half-siblings battling to take control over the family business -- a ramshackle summer resort on the South Shore of Nova Scotia, one septic tank away from bankruptcy and with a dark family secret at its core.

TV Series.title: The Boys
TV Series.overview: When superheroes abuse their superpowers instead of using them for good, The Boys embark on a heroic quest to expose the truth about The Seven and Vought, the conglomerate that covers up their dirty secrets.

TV Series.title: Judy Justice
TV Series.overview: EMMY® AWARD WINNER - The Honorable Judy Sheindlin, retired Judge of the Manhattan Family Court, brings her signature blend of sharp wit and wisdom, hilarious candor and unwavering honesty that has made her America’s favorite judge for over 25 years, as she presides over real cases, arbitrates binding decisions and delivers what only she can: “Judy Justice."

TV Series.title: Hazbin Hotel
TV Series.overview: This adult animated musical series follows Charlie, the princess of Hell, as she pursues her seemingly impossible goal of rehabilitating demons to peacefully reduce overpopulation in her kingdom. After a yearly extermination that was imposed by Heaven, she opens a hotel in the hopes that patrons will be "checking out" after proving their souls are redeemable.

TV Series.title: Goliath
TV Series.overview: Billy McBride returns to criminal defense, taking on a grisly double murder case. His client is a 16-year-old boy, and Billy’s damn sure he’s innocent. Billy, Patty, and the team fervently build their case in the seedy underworld of Los Angeles. As the murders’ true culprits come to light, the implications reach as far as the mayoral race — and the city’s preeminent billionaire developer.

TV Series.title: The Girlfriend
TV Series.overview: In this juicy psychological thriller, Laura (Robin Wright) has it all: a glittering career, a loving husband, and her prized son, Daniel. But her perfect life unravels when Daniel brings home Cherry (Olivia Cooke), a girlfriend who changes everything. Laura’s convinced Cherry is hiding something. Is she a manipulative social climber, or is Laura just paranoid? The truth is a matter of perspective.

TV Series.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Rings of Power
TV Series.overview: Set thousands of years before the events of J.R.R. Tolkien’s The Lord of the Rings, this epic drama follows an ensemble cast of characters, both familiar and new, as they confront the long-feared re-emergence of evil to Middle-earth.

TV Series.title: The Better Sister
TV Series.overview: Chloe moves in New York's most elite circles with her lawyer husband Adam and teenage son Ethan by her side while her estranged sister Nicky tries to make ends meet and stay clean. When Adam is brutally murdered, the investigation sends shockwaves through the family and exposes long-buried secrets.

TV Series.title: The Terminal List
TV Series.overview: Navy SEAL Commander James Reece turns to vengeance as he investigates the mysterious forces behind the murder of his entire platoon. Free from the military’s command structure, Reece applies the lessons he’s learned from nearly two decades of warfare to hunt down the people responsible.

TV Series.title: The Mighty Nein

TV Series.title: The Summer I Turned Pretty

Movies.title: Hope Gap
Movies.overview: A couple's visit with their son takes a dramatic turn when the father tells him that he plans on leaving his mother for another woman.

Movies.title: Gunfight at Dry River
Movies.overview: The arrival of a stranger in an Old West town threatens to upend the wicked Ryles family’s control over a Mexican border town’s only water source.

Movies.title: Beauty and the Billionaire: Bali
Movies.overview: A self-serving billionaire benefactor and a selfless doctor working at a free health clinic in Bali butt heads when forced to work together.

Movies.title: Second Chance
Movies.overview: A children's ministry director and a criminal fall for each other as they are forced to work together at the church. As walls break down, both discover God's love-and a second chance at healing, grace, and unexpected romance.

Movies.title: Take My Hand
Movies.overview: Living in London, at the peak of her career, a mother of three is diagnosed with MS. Following the sudden death of her husband and the loss of her job, she moves back home to Australia; where a chance encounter with her high school sweetheart gives her renewed hope in love as she battles the disease.

Movies.title: Four Letters of Love
Movies.overview: Nicholas and Isabel are made for each other, but as destiny pulls them together, family, passion and faith drives them apart. As they embark on journeys of heartache and misplaced love, fate soon contrives to pull the threads of their lives together.

Movies.title: The Mandela Effect
Movies.overview: A man becomes obsessed with facts and events that have been collectively misremembered by thousands of people. Believing the phenomena to be the symptom of something larger, his obsession eventually leads him to question reality itself.

Movies.title: Maximum Overdrive
Movies.overview: After a comet turns every machine on Earth into a homicidal rampage device, a band of survivors makes a last stand, and vengeance goes into overdrive.

Movies.title: The Illusionist
Movies.overview: In 19th century Vienna, a magician uses his talents to win the love of a noble woman but makes an enemy of the Crown Prince, now his romantic rival.

Movies.title: The Librarian: Return to King Solomon's Mines
Movies.overview: A lovable antiquities scholar and a brainy archaeologist hunt for a legendary holy book, but must elude a sinister general and a scheming uncle.

Movies.title: Dr. Jekyll and Mr. Hyde
Movies.overview: An attorney defending a confessed serial killer physician who wants the death penalty begins to pursue a loophole that blames his client’s alter ego.

Movies.title: The Librarian: Quest for the Spear
Movies.overview: A student working at the New York Public Library discovers historical treasures. Now, he must guard them from powerful forces of evil.

Movies.title: 6 Hours: The End
Movies.overview: After discovering that his city's nuclear reactor is poised to explode, an ordinary young man has six hours to help his friends escape annihilation.

Movies.title: The Distant Jump
Movies.overview: Jennifer's daughter is abducted by a criminal organization that plans to harvest her supernatural abilities in order to jump into a distant, alternate reality.

Movies.title: Dragon Blade
Movies.overview: Jackie Chan, John Cusack and Academy Award winner Adrien Brody star as warriors battling over the lucrative Silk Road in this epic action adventure.

Movies.title: Daylight's End
Movies.overview: Years after a mysterious plague has devastated the planet and turned most of humanity into blood-hungry creatures, a rogue drifter on a vengeful hunt stumbles across a band of survivors in an abandoned police station and reluctantly agrees to try to help them defend themselves and escape to the sanctuary they so desperately need.

Movies.title: Day of the Dead
Movies.overview: Mena Suvari (American Horror Story) and Nick Cannon (Brooklyn Nine-Nine) take on the zombie horde in this horror remake based on George A. Romero's classic zombie film. When a strange virus infects a small Colorado town, the military is brought to stop the spread and enforce a quarantine. But as people become infected, the survivors realise that the virus is turning them into the walking dead.

Movies.title: The Wildman of Shaggy Creek
Movies.overview: Scott's move to a new town becomes a heart-pounding adventure when he accepts a dare to camp in the ominous woods. Armed only with his fearless friend Hailey, he must confront the legend of a terrifying creature lurking in the shadows.

Movies.title: Vivarium
Movies.overview: A young couple looking for the perfect home find themselves trapped in a mysterious, labyrinth-like neighborhood of identical houses.

Movies.title: 2036 Origin Unknown
Movies.overview: A shrewd astronaut works with her ship's artificial intelligence system to uncover the mystery behind an unknown object found on Mars.

Movies.title: In His Father's Shoes
Movies.overview: Louis Gossett Jr. stars as a dying father whose shoes grant his son the ability to go back in time and experience his life’s lessons.

Movies.title: Sundown
Movies.overview: Two friends head to Puerto Vallarta for spring break, but find themselves falling for the wrong girl, and getting stuck in a world of trouble.

Movies.title: Zoe's Having a Baby
Movies.overview: Zoe Cain wants a baby. Single, and tired of the saturated NYC dating scene, she decides to go it alone. Using an anonymous sperm donor, the chances are slim but Zoe quickly becomes pregnant. She is elated but things get more than complicated when not one, but two eligible bachelors walk into her life...

Movies.title: Undercover Angel
Movies.overview: Harrison Tyler is a struggling pulp fiction writer who just can't find love.  When an ex-girlfriend shows up at his door asking him to take care of her six-year-old daughter for a month, Harrison ends up with more than he bargained for: a little girl determined to play matchmaker for him.  The youngster manages to find Harrison a girlfriend, but when her mother shows up to claim her.

Movies.title: Unexpected
Movies.overview: A couple unable to agree on whether to adopt or not turns to home renovations and rescuing wildlife in an attempt to solve their problems.

Movies.title: The Boyfriend Trap
Movies.overview: Identical twins Alice and Lacey are mistaken for each other on a retreat. They decide to go with it just for the trip, soon they realize that they may have been wrong about who and what they needed in their lives all along.

Movies.title: Robo
Movies.overview: With dreams of becoming a comic book artist, preteen Mitya gets fodder for his future career when he befriends a rogue robot created by his parents.

Movies.title: My Sex Doll
Movies.overview: If he wants to avoid a $50 million debt, an adult virgin afraid of women will be forced to have sex with a robot that has the ability to become human.

Movies.title: The Big Trip
Movies.overview: A stork mistakenly delivers a baby panda to the wrong door. A bear, a moose, a tiger, and a rabbit set on a fun filled adventure to return the panda home.

Movies.title: Miller's Girl
Movies.overview: In this provocative thriller, a young writer (Jenna Ortega) and her professor (Martin Freeman) become entangled in a complex web where the lines blur as their lives intertwine.

Movies.title: Autumn and the Black Jaguar
Movies.overview: Growing up in the Amazon rainforest gave Autumn the rarest of friendships - a lost jaguar cub she discovers named Hope, before a tragic event forces Autumn to move to New York City. Aged 14, and having grown accustomed to city life, Autumn discovers her childhood village is under threat from animal traffickers and decides she must return to the Amazon to her beloved jaguar.

Movies.title: Scared Shitless
Movies.overview: A plumber and his germaphobic son are forced to get their hands dirty to save the residents of an apartment building when a genetically engineered, blood-thirsty, creature escapes into the plumbing system.

Movies.title: Robinson Crusoe
Movies.overview: A tropical island paradise, run by animals only, gets the change of a lifetime when a raging storm strands a human being on their land.

Movies.title: Delta Farce
Movies.overview: A trio of bumbling friends are mistaken for soldiers and sent to Iraq, finding themselves deserted in a rural village that desperately needs help.

Movies.title: Love, Weddings & Other Disasters
Movies.overview: A colorful cast of characters search for love against the backdrop of a wedding between a bride and groom with competing visions for their nuptials.

Movies.title: Not Quite an Angel
Movies.overview: A struggling single father watches as his mysterious new caterer brings love and organization to his home. She might just be heaven-sent.

Movies.title: The Very Excellent Mr. Dundee
Movies.overview: Australian film icon Paul Hogan is pulled from his cushy retirement into the tabloids when a series of misunderstandings and scandals crop up.

Movies.title: My One True Love
Movies.overview: When an alarmingly accurate fortune teller steers Ali towards the supposed love of her life, she must choose between trusting destiny and her heart.

Movies.title: The Slammin' Salmon
Movies.overview: A restauranteur and former boxer forces his staff to help him pay off a Japanese crime ring. The winner gets ten grand; the loser gets a smack down.

Movies.title: My Best Friend's Girl
Movies.overview: Tank faces the ultimate test of friendship when his best friend Dustin hires him to take his ex-girlfriend Alexis out on a lousy date, in a plan to make her realise how great Dustin is. The problem is, Tank finds himself falling for her instead.

Movies.title: Love Jacked
Movies.overview: Una artista viaja a África en busca de inspiración y regresa con un prometido misterioso, sorprendiendo a su familia con su verdadera identidad.

Movies.title: Open House
Movies.overview: After her husband tells her he wants to end their marriage, a full-time mother, Samantha Morrow, opens her home to boarders to make ends meet.

Movies.title: Still Waiting...
Movies.overview: When a rival eatery steals their customers, waiters hatch a raunchy plan to increase business.

Movies.title: Angry Neighbors
Movies.overview: Frank Langella, Bobby Cannavale, and Cheech Marin star in this comedy about a grumpy novelist who vows revenge when his wealthy neighbor builds a hideous mega-mansion next door. Based on the bestselling novel Lapham Rising.

Movies.title: The Promotion
Movies.overview: Two assistant managers of a corporate grocery store vie for the coveted top job at the chain's new location.

Movies.title: The Inheritance
Movies.overview: Forbidden love between a beautiful orphan and a single, upper-class bachelor sparks jealousy and deceit in the family that took her in as a child.

Movies.title: The Ruse
Movies.overview: A young in-home caregiver fears for her life after being assigned to look after a mysterious elderly patient in a remote seaside home.

Movies.title: Stillwater
Movies.overview: An Oklahoma man is confronted with language barriers and a complicated legal system when he travels to France to exonerate his estranged daughter.

Movies.title: No Tears in Hell
Movies.overview: In the frozen darkness of an Alaskan winter, a mother and son turn their home into a house of nightmares - luring victims into a twisted web of abuse and cannibalism. Based on the terrifying true story of Russian serial killer Alexander Spesivtsev.

Movies.title: Secret in Their Eyes
Movies.overview: A tight-knit team of rising investigators – Ray and Jess, along with their supervisor Claire – is suddenly torn apart when they discover that Jess’s teenage daughter has been brutally and inexplicably murdered.

Movies.title: Paul McCartney - Eine Beatles-Legende
Movies.overview: Paul McCartney is one of the biggest legends in Music. In this authorised documentary he talks candidly about his contribution to the Beatles, his relationship with John Lennon and much more. With contributions from George Martin, Donovan and many more.

Movies.title: The Nanny Diaries
Movies.overview: A recent college graduate takes on a nannying job in a snobby New York penthouse that requires more parenting than she could have ever imagined.

Movies.title: Stand Up Guys
Movies.overview: After one of them gets paroled, three retired gangsters reunite and reminisce as another ponders his next job — killing his old friend.

Movies.title: Lady in the Locket
Movies.overview: Darcy inherits her aunt's old house, only to find the spirit still lingers. With help from the town's widowed sheriff and his daughter, she uncovers a buried family secret-and an unexpected romance.

Movies.title: Employee of the Month
Movies.overview: Two ultra-competitive Super Club workers vie for the "Employee of the Month" title and to win the heart of the hot new cashier in this outrageous comedy.

Movies.title: FernGully: The Last Rainforest
Movies.overview: The magical inhabitants of a rainforest must fight to save their home from the looming threat of a logging and a polluting force of destruction.

Movies.title: Miss Willoughby and the Haunted Bookshop
Movies.overview: Elizabeth Willoughby is a woman of many talents. History professor, detective, and adventurer, there is no mystery she can't solve. But even Miss Willoughby is baffled when an old family friend tells her that a ghost is haunting the antique bookstore she runs. Is someone playing a trick on the poor woman? Is it an hallucination? Or is something more sinister going on?

Movies.title: The Forever Purge
Movies.overview: Adela and her husband, Juan, live in Texas, where he works as a ranch hand for the wealthy Tucker family. On the morning after the Purge, a masked gang of killers attacks the Tuckers, forcing both families to band together and fight back.

Movies.title: America Is Sinking
Movies.overview: Melting glaciers in the North Pole trigger natural disasters, sinking America. Scientists race to restore the Pole's freezing temperatures.

Movies.title: Dangerous
Movies.overview: A reformed sociopath (Scott Eastwood) fights to uncover the truth behind his brother's death in this thriller costarring Mel Gibson, Kevin Durand, Famke Janssen, and Tyrese Gibson.

Movies.title: Young Guns
Movies.overview: A group of young gunmen, led by Billy the Kid, become deputies to avenge the murder of the rancher who became their benefactor. But when Billy takes their authority too far, they become the hunted.

Movies.title: Jurassic Reborn
Movies.overview: When cutting-edge research leads to the creation of living dinosaurs, scientists on a secluded island must risk their lives and confront the now-growing creatures to prevent the animals from escaping and attacking the mainland.

Movies.title: Far Haven
Movies.overview: In 1887, Hunter Braddock moves back to Far Haven, Arizona to start over with his two young children, but when his father-in-law is brutally attacked he must take on the corrupt forces strangling the town in order to protect what he loves most.

Movies.title: Expedition: Greenland
Movies.overview: A daring team of seven embarks on the ambitious pursuit of being the first to traverse the long axis of Greenland's remote and unexplored ice sheet in specialized Arctic Trucks, captured through the lens of a solo shooter.

Movies.title: Super Volcano
Movies.overview: When a super-volcano threatens the island of Hawaii, a team of rescue and disaster experts who are called in to help must race against the clock to save those in the path of the molten lava and stop the volcano for good.

Movies.title: Lord of War
Movies.overview: To wage war, you need weapons, but where do you go to acquire the guns, grenades, tanks and rockets you need to get the edge over your enemy? Meet Yuri Orlov (Nicolas Cage), international businessman and arms dealer to eight of the world’s top ten war zones… From critically acclaimed writer-director Andrew Niccol (The Truman Show, Gattaca) comes a slick, contemporary thriller about international arms dealers.

Movies.title: Inferno
Movies.overview: Desperate to flee the inner demons raging inside him, mysterious loner Eddie Lomax rides to the last outpost of an abandoned desert highway, prepared to end it all. But when a savage gang steals his prized cycle and leaves him for dead, Eddie's life is saved by a soulmate from his past. Burning with a new reason to live, Eddie sets off on a one-man search and destroy mission against his attackers.

Movies.title: Arctic Blast
Movies.overview: When a solar eclipse sends a colossal blast of super-chilled air towards Earth, it then sets off a catastrophic chain of events that threatens to engulf the world in ice - and begin a new Ice Age.

Movies.title: 24 Hours to Live
Movies.overview: A former special-ops soldier, turned mercenary, is given one last shot at redemption on a non-stop,danger-packed mission, on which his life depends.

Movies.title: Drive Angry
Movies.overview: A vengeful father chases after the men who killed his daughter and kidnapped his granddaughter.

Movies.title: Never Back Down
Movies.overview: A bullied teenager discovers an underground fight club, where he meets a savvy mentor who trains him in the art of mixed martial arts.

Movies.title: Stream
Movies.overview: A peaceful stay in a quaint hotel is just what the Keenan family needs, however that is not what is in store for them. With four deranged murderers patrolling the seemingly mundane halls and competing in a twisted game, the odds are definitely not in Roy's favor. He must fight for his life and those of his family as their simple weekend getaway truly turns into a vacation to die for.

Movies.title: The Son of Bigfoot
Movies.overview: A lonely boy’s search for his long-lost dad upends life as he knew it as an ordinary human with superpowers and an evil corporation after his DNA.

Movies.title: Peppermint
Movies.overview: A vigilante seeks justice against her family's killers.

Movies.title: Beyond
Movies.overview: Detective John Koski, an expert in tracking down kidnapped children, is about to be thrust into one of the strangest cases of his career. When the police chief's niece, Amy, goes missing her workaholic mother, sinister father and a flirtatious babysitter all come under suspicion. But the most mysterious suspect of all is Rory, Amy's imaginary friend who's starting to become very real.

Movies.title: Big Stan
Movies.overview: Panicked he’ll be defenseless in prison, a gutless con man sentenced to hard time for fraud gets 11th hour training from a martial arts master.

Movies.title: I, Frankenstein
Movies.overview: Frankenstein’s monster becomes caught in a long-running war between two immortal clans.

Movies.title: Spy Kids: All the Time in the World
Movies.overview: Marissa Cortez Wilson is a retired spy who keeps that identity hidden from her clueless husband and whip-smart twin stepchildren, Rebecca and Cecil. However, when a villain called Timekeeper threatens to conquer the world, Marissa springs back into action as head of the OSS, home of the now-defunct Spy Kids Division. With help from some cool gadgets and two former spy kids, Rebecca and Cecil join

Movies.title: Final Score
Movies.overview: After deadly terrorists abduct his niece at a soccer match, an ex-soldier with lethal fighting skills (Dave Bautista) wages a one-man war to save her and prevent mass destruction.

Movies.title: Rock Dog
Movies.overview: When a young mastiff, Bodi (Luke Wilson), discovers a radio, it takes just a few guitar licks for his fate to be sealed: Bodi wants to be a rock 'n' roll star!

Movies.title: Safe
Movies.overview: Mei, a young girl whose memory holds a priceless numerical code, finds herself pursued by the Triads, the Russian mob, and corrupt NYC cops. Coming to her aid is an ex-cage fighter whose life was destroyed by the gangsters on Mei's trail.

Movies.title: F9
Movies.overview: Dom Toretto and his crew come together to stop a world-shattering plot by the most skilled assassin and high-performance driver they've ever encountered: Dom's forsaken brother.

Movies.title: Ice Storm
Movies.overview: When a devastating winter storm slams into North Carolina with the lowest recorded temperatures in history, the whole state starts to freeze over. As temperatures turn even colder, climatologists and disaster relief experts race to save lives and stop the storm before it freezes the entire East Coast.

Movies.title: Hotel Transylvania: Transformania
Movies.overview: Reunite with your favorite monsters for an adventure that presents Drac with a terrifying task.

Movies.title: Nobody
Movies.overview: In a barrage of fists, gunfire and squealing tires, an enraged man must save his wife and son from a dangerous adversary -- and ensure that he will never be underestimated again.

Movies.title: Sing 2
Movies.overview: All your favorite singing, dancing all-stars from Illumination’s Sing return in the definitive feel-good event of the year. The ever-optimistic Koala, Buster Moon, and his cast have big dreams of staging their most dazzling show yet in the glittering entertainment capital of the world, Redshore City.

Movies.title: View from the Top
Movies.overview: Gwyneth Paltrow stars in this hilarious comedy, about a small-town girl with time big plans. When she sets her sights on becoming a first-class international flight attendant, Donna throws caution to the wind and takes off in pursuit of her dream.

Movies.title: See Spot Run
Movies.overview: A mailman takes in a stray dog only to learn that it's an FBI drug-sniffing canine that has escaped from a witness protection program and is now targeted for assassination by a crime boss.

Movies.title: Birth of the Dragon
Movies.overview: The fight that changed the history of martial arts in America.

Movies.title: The Concorde... Airport '79
Movies.overview: As Concorde flies from Washington to Moscow via Paris with members of the Russian and American Olympic teams on board, a gang of saboteurs waits for its moment to strike. Can the flight crew save the supersonic jet from a missile attack, the loss of a cargo door and an attempted runway landing with no brakes?

Movies.title: Let the Corpses Tan
Movies.overview: Hélène Cattet and Bruno Forzani turn their genre-scrambling attention to European crime films of the 1970s with this kinetic brain-melter. Fixing Sergio Leone in its stylistic crosshairs, Let the Corpses Tan reduces plot to essentials, all the better to let rip with a psychedelic formal assault.

Movies.title: Fields of War
Movies.overview: During the war between Kosovo and Serbia, a doctor is accused of being a traitor, as he befriends and treats the only Serbian family in his village.

Movies.title: Eagle Wings
Movies.overview: When a recently married Nigerian Air Force commander is lost behind enemy lines, his brothers in arms swear to his wife they will bring him back home.

Movies.title: The Conquest of Siberia
Movies.overview: A young officer sent to the depths of Siberia finds himself drawn into a conspiracy by local princes, who are hunting for hidden gold.

Movies.title: The Last Warrior
Movies.overview: In the final days of WWII, a U.S. operative on a remote island finds himself in a battle to the death with a Japanese soldier seeking vengeance.

Movies.title: Shattered City: The Halifax Explosion
Movies.overview: A true story about the tragic explosion at Halifax Harbour, Canada in the early hours of December 6, 1917.

Movies.title: Saigon: Year of the Cat
Movies.overview: Two Westerners, Barbara Dean (Dame Judi Dench), bank employee, and Bob Chesneau (Frederic Forrest), C.I.A. analyst within the U.S. Embassy, meet a short time before the fall of Saigon.

Movies.title: Snow Treasure
Movies.overview: Based on the novel about a gang of Norwegian children who help their allies when their neutral, peaceful country is invaded by Nazi Germany in 1940.

Movies.title: Marked Man
Movies.overview: A legendary and fearless warrior in the Mongolian military is persecuted when he's sentenced to serve hard prison time with his enemies.

Movies.title: Steel Rain 2: Summit
Movies.overview: During a peace summit about the Korean Peninsula, the leaders of North and South Korea and the United States are taken hostage on a nuclear submarine.

Movies.title: Frogmen Operation Stormbringer
Movies.overview: It’s up to a team of Navy Seals to track down and capture a terrorist before he obtains an advanced cluster bomb from Albanian rogues.

Movies.title: Tank Commandos
Movies.overview: A war-hardened demolition squad under constant risk of death discover that Germans are bringing tanks across a river by way of a submerged bridge.

Movies.title: Crossroads
Movies.overview: A detective on the brink of retirement is the only hope for a group of suspects charged with the robbery of a powerful senator’s trophy wife.

Movies.title: Marines
Movies.overview: Marine Colonel Anslow (George Roberson) saw eleven of his men killed and two captured the last time he tried to capture Russian terrorist Vladimir Antonov (Hristo Shopov). Now he's attempting it again, but he's only got 36 hours to rescue his men. Enlisting the aid of a shifty group of Russian soldiers, Anslow might be able to do it.

Movies.title: Rocket Hunter
Movies.overview: As WWII nears a close, an American B-17 pilot volunteers for a daring mission to save Londoners from the looming threat of V-2 rockets.

Movies.title: Condor's Nest
Movies.overview: After the fall of Nazi Germany, an American aviator travels across South America in search of war criminals, but gets more than he bargained for.

Movies.title: Air Strike
Movies.overview: Explosive battle action and intense drama frame this epic about China’s courage in battle and trying to stop Japan’s bomber strikes during WW II.

Movies.title: Special Forces
Movies.overview: In this heart-stopping war film, a US Special Forces unit must rescue an American reporter who has been kidnapped by a former Bosnian War general.

Movies.title: Shadow Wolves
Movies.overview: A wayward NSA agent is assigned to a new covert unit made up of elite Native American trackers assigned to neutralize drug cartels along the Border.

Movies.title: A Soldier's Revenge
Movies.overview: Frank Connor is a Civil War hero turned bounty hunter who spends his time polishing off whiskey and tracking down fugitives for a small charge. When two children turn up on his doorstep, desperate for his help to find their missing mother, Frank finds that he must face up to his past and head towards a showdown with a notorious Major with whom he has an old score to settle.

Movies.title: Bagdad Cafe
Movies.overview: A lonely German woman ends up in the most desolate motel on Earth and decides to make it brighter for a disparate group of people who really need it.

Movies.title: Chrysalis
Movies.overview: Three women, three eras, one destiny; in 1923, Violeta falls in love with a young man who wants to flee to France; in 1941, Inês lives in a desert waiting for her lost lover, Paco; in 1975, Luísa realises that she was afraid to love her whole life.

Movies.title: Battle for Cassino
Movies.overview: WW2 Allied forces fight a bloody, controversial battle to break through the Gustav Line, bombing an Italian monastery and opening the road to Rome.

Movies.title: To Go Viking
Movies.overview: A Viking Age group makes its way across Europe, participating in massive-scale reenactments and a series of epic, full-contact competitive battles.

Movies.title: End of Truth
Movies.overview: An emotionally powerful investigation into the political and criminal enterprise of kidnappings as ISIS rose to power in war torn Syria. By intercutting exclusive footage with intimate interviews of negotiators, investigators, fixers and even a used car salesman who are caught up in the confusion, we examine the leads that led to lies revealing the terrible consequence of misinformation.

Movies.title: A Doctor's Sword
Movies.overview: The true story of an Irish doctor, who survived Dunkirk, the A-bomb, and other WW2 horrors, resolves 70 years later, on his daughter’s quest in Japan.

Movies.title: From War to Wisdom
Movies.overview: Veterans of the most decorated Battalion in Marine Corps history discuss mental wounds and the trauma of civilian life after the adrenaline of battle.

Movies.title: Zelenskyy: Spirit of Ukraine
Movies.overview: The story of the comedic actor and family man-turned-president and his courageous defense of his nation during a full-scale Russian invasion.

Movies.title: Spitfire Paddy: The Ace with the Shamrock
Movies.overview: Explore the life and career of Brendan Finucane, a leading World War II fighter ace and the youngest Wing Commander in the Royal Air Force history.

Movies.title: Forgive - Don't Forget
Movies.overview: A Japanese sword, surrendered at the end of WWII, makes the journey back to its original owner in this documentary exploring the legacy of war.

Movies.title: The Nazi Quest for the Holy Grail
Movies.overview: In the final days of the Second World War, American troops discovered a vast hoard of mysterious Nazi files hidden in a cave in Southern Germany. Buried deep in these secret documents were the details of one of the Third Reichs most shadowy projects: the hunt to discover the lost Aryan civilization from which the Nazis believed they had descended.

Movies.title: Battle of Dunkirk: From Disaster to Triumph
Movies.overview: Dunkirk veterans, crossing the English Channel to rescue stranded soldiers, share their tales of heroism in a battle that changed the course of WWII.

Movies.title: Wounded Land
Movies.overview: This inspiring documentary tells the stories of hard-working people in Ukraine who, against all odds, remain engaged in continuing in business.

Movies.title: Journey to Royal: A WWII Rescue Mission
Movies.overview: Filmmaker Christopher Johnson tells of his great-uncle Lt. Royal Stratton a WWII rescue pilot who died saving the lives of nine downed airmen.

Movies.title: National Bird
Movies.overview: US military veterans, plagued by guilt over the killing of faceless people in foreign lands, break the silence surrounding America's secret drone war.

Movies.title: The Irritable Heart
Movies.overview: After his last tour, decorated Marine Travis Twiggs and his brother Willard embark on a tragic, final road trip. This is their story.

Movies.title: Mosul
Movies.overview: An Iraqi journalist and a rescued policeman join a SWAT team, navigating secrecy and fierce battles to liberate Mosul from terrorist strongholds.

Movies.title: The Hello Girls
Movies.overview: This documentary brings you back to 1918, when the U.S. Army Signal Corps sent 223 heroic women to France to work as telephone operators.

Movies.title: The Coming War on China
Movies.overview: Filmed on five locations across Asia and the Pacific over two years, this documentary explores the possibility of war between two world powers.

Movies.title: Secrets of the Tribe
Movies.overview: Unhealthy encounter: Yanomami tribe meets Western anthropologists in the Amazon.

Movies.title: City of Ghosts
Movies.overview: A documentary that follows the efforts of "Raqqa Is Being Slaughtered Silently," a handful of anonymous activists who banded together after their homeland was taken over by ISIS in 2014.

Movies.title: Stalin and the Katyn Massacre
Movies.overview: Exposes the truth behind the 1940 executions of 22,000 Polish prisoners of war, and the Soviet NKVD's role in a crime long attributed to the Nazis.

Movies.title: Lincoln and Lee at Antietam: The Cost of Freedom
Movies.overview: Historical documentary on the Battle of Antietam in 1862, the bloodiest day of the Civil War, that claimed nearly 4,000 lives and wounded over 17,000.

Movies.title: Cold War
Movies.overview: A passionate love story between two people of different backgrounds and temperaments, who are fatefully mismatched, set against the background of the Cold War in the 1950s in Poland, Berlin, Yugoslavia and Paris.

Movies.title: Under Fiesta Stars
Movies.overview: When the singing cowboy and a feisty gal jointly inherit a ranch and mine, he must use his wits and charm to keep her from selling the land to crooks.

Movies.title: Operation Rock the Troops
Movies.overview: One man's ambitions take him on an unexpected journey across the world. He will struggle against time and setbacks to assemble a team ready to tour with one mission, to rock the troops!

Movies.title: The Dazzling Light of Sunset
Movies.overview: Featuring a local two-faced television team in rural Georgia. The two reporters, Dariko and Khaka, follow the most diverse stories, from elections to fashion shows for teenagers.

Movies.title: Vinyl Generation

Follow the most tremendous Aussies on their long road to success becoming Australia's first ProTour cycling team.

Movies.title: Will Smith: The Prince of Hollywood
