Movies.overview: Set in 1943, this is the story of the heroic staff members and students at a Catholic boarding school who hide three Jewish children from Nazis.

Movies.title: Memories of Anne Frank
Movies.overview: Italian adaptation of Anne Frank’s childhood friend Hanneli Goslar’s memoir of their lives in Amsterdam before the Frank family went into hiding.

Movies.title: Unabomber: The True Story
Movies.overview: U.S. postal inspector Ben Jeffries attempts to identify an amateur bomb-maker, who turns out to be Ted Kaczynski, a former professor turned recluse.

Movies.title: The Strange Case of Sherlock Holmes & Arthur Conan Doyle
Movies.overview: Set between 1892 and 1899 when Sherlock Holmes was killed off by his creator and Doyle was in his late 30s. It was during this electrifying and disturbed period that Doyle agrees to work with a biographer, Seldon, to write an account of his life. To Doyle's mounting horror, Seldon begins to peel back the many faces of Holmes to reveal his true origins.

Movies.title: Tai-Pan
Movies.overview: Set in China during the 19th century, Dirk Struan is the power-hungry head of community who has big plans for expansion in Hong Kong. His quest is hindered by a number of rivals who seek to overthrow him and take his position for themselves.

Movies.title: Die Ketzerbraut
Movies.overview: After a powerful priest kills her family, a young woman is left a social outcast. She teams up with a free-spirited man and his friend, Martin Luther.

Movies.title: Newton's Grace
Movies.overview: Newton's Grace is the true story of a real "Prodigal Son," the story of miraculous forgiveness and change that lies behind the powerful words of one of the world's most beloved hymns.

Movies.title: J.S. Bach: The Music, The Life, The Legend
Movies.overview: French biographical drama about the life and works of classical composer Johann Sebastian Bach, delving into his passionate devotion to music

Movies.title: But Always
Movies.overview: A man and a woman unexpectedly reconnect after many years apart. Much to their mutual surprise, the feelings they had come rushing back.

Movies.title: Lapwing
Movies.overview: An isolated group of salt farmers arranges illegal passage to Europe for a family in hiding, but a love affair threatens to destroy both communities.

Movies.title: Eiffel
Movies.overview: The French government asks Gustave Eiffel to make a grand design for the 1889 Paris World Fair. Inspired by love, he creates a masterpiece.

Movies.title: Saint Judy
Movies.overview: The true story of immigration attorney Judy Wood, and how she single-handedly changed the U.S. law of asylum to save women's lives.

Movies.title: The Black Velvet Gown
Movies.overview: After receiving a job as a housekeeper for a former teacher, a widow finds that his generosity has unforeseen consequences for her children.

Movies.title: Emperor
Movies.overview: Tommy Lee Jones is General Douglas MacArthur, who tasks one of his men with deciding if Emperor Hirohito should be hanged as a war criminal.

Movies.title: No Child of Mine
Movies.overview: Charts the nightmare descent of 11-year-old Kerry from being sex trafficked by her father to abuse in Britain's care system to the cold streets.

Movies.title: Salem Witch Trials
Movies.overview: A masterful work accurately details the current consensus of what exactly occurred to prompt the colonial witch-trials.

Movies.title: Kundo: Age of the Rampant
Movies.overview: A Robin Hood tale for the Joseon Dynasty period, a militia group rebels against societal inequality by stealing from the rich and giving to the poor.

Movies.title: Adidas Vs. Puma: The Brother's Feud
Movies.overview: The story of two brothers whose joint business venture leads to tensions, forcing them to go their separate ways and create two iconic sports brands.

Movies.title: Terra Nova
Movies.overview: On the banks of Newfoundland in the early 1930's, the fishing vessel Terra Nova is struggling with their worst year to date when the captain makes a rash and potentially deadly decision to make a first time voyage to harsh waters outside Greenland.

Movies.title: Untold Scandal
Movies.overview: Palace intrigue threatens to take down the innocent victims of a ruthless personal bet that a royal woman makes with an equally narcissistic playboy.

Movies.title: The Fifteen Streets
Movies.overview: A rugged dock worker and the daughter of a wealthy shipbuilder struggle to find love across class divides in grim early-20th century northern England.

Movies.title: The Troubles: A Dublin Story
Movies.overview: Two Dublin brothers must navigate loyalty, honor, and the dangerous world of republicanism as they fuel the Northern conflict by any means necessary.

Movies.title: A Taxi Driver
Movies.overview: In this powerful drama based on a true story, a down-on-his-luck taxi driver hired by a foreign journalist finds himself in a life-or-death struggle in the midst of the Gwanju Uprising.

Movies.title: Charms for the Easy Life
Movies.overview: Three generations come to terms with their hopes as an abandoned wife deals with her romantic-minded daughter and a granddaughter stuck in the middle.

Movies.title: Diverted
Movies.overview: The story of the 38 planes that were diverted on 9/11 to Gander, Canada, where 7,000 passengers were taken in until American airspace reopened.

Movies.title: Soldier Boy
Movies.overview: The true story of Russia’s youngest World War II hero who lost his family at age six and was trained as a soldier worthy of the Military Merit Medal.

Movies.title: Kings of the Evening
Movies.overview: In a bleak Depression-era Southern town, a recently released ex-con finds purpose and camaraderie by participating in an underground fashion contest.

Movies.title: Crash Landing: The Rescue of Flight 232
Movies.overview: The suspense-filled true story of United Airlines Flight 232, which crash-landed at an airport in Sioux City, Iowa on July 19, 1989.

Movies.title: Cassandro
Movies.overview: Saúl Armendáriz, a gay amateur wrestler from El Paso, rises to international stardom after he creates the character Cassandro, the “Liberace of Lucha Libre.” In the process, he upends not just the macho wrestling world but also his own life.

Movies.title: The Final Inquiry
Movies.overview: In 35 AD, the Roman emperor sends a warrior to visit Jerusalem to investigate the death and disprove the rumored resurrection of Jesus of Nazareth.

Movies.title: SOS: The Titanic Inquiry
Movies.overview: As the Titanic sank frantic passengers spotted lights that appeared to come from a nearby ship. But it did not come to their rescue. What was the ship? Why did it do nothing? Titanic Inquiry is the sensational true story of the SS Californian. Was it the ship seen from the deck of the Titanic? Did it stand idly by and watch as the Titanic sank and hundreds died?

Movies.title: The Proposition
Movies.overview: Set in the 1800s in the Welsh countryside, a widow fights to protect herself, her children and her land with help from an unlikely ally.

Movies.title: Tanks for Stalin
Movies.overview: 1940. The Russians send a prototype of a new cutting-edge tank on a secret mission to Moscow. Soon the cross-country run turns into a ruthless race.

Movies.title: In Dubious Battle
Movies.overview: A fight for 900 migrant workers against unfair wages and conditions turns into an all-out battle for survival in 1930’s California apple country.

Movies.title: Radioactive
Movies.overview: From the 1870s to the modern era, Radioactive iis a journey through Marie Curie’s (Rosamund Pike) enduring legacies – her passionate relationships, scientific breakthroughs, and the consequences that followed for her and for the world. After meeting fellow scientist Pierre Curie (Sam Riley), the pair marry and change the face of science forever by their discovery of radioactivity.

Movies.title: Harsens Island Revenge
Movies.overview: Set in the roaring 1920s, Harsens Island Revenge follows WWI veterans defending their community from the notorious Purple Gang's illegal booze trade and extortion-an action-packed tale of loyalty, bravery, and justice during Prohibition.

Movies.title: Roe v. Wade
Movies.overview: Doctors and advocates square off in a national battle in this take on the events leading to a contentious U.S. Supreme Court decision.

Movies.title: Child 44
Movies.overview: When Leo Demidov, a war hero but now disgraced member of the military police, uncovers evidence of a serial killer, he must work against the all-powerful Soviet regime in order to track him down before he strikes again.

Movies.title: The Apocalypse
Movies.overview: From the Emmy Award-winning Bible Collection comes a production starring Richard Harris as the Apostle John. Detailing John's visions against the backdrop of the severe persecution of Christians in the first century, this biblically based film will inspire viewers.

Movies.title: The Count of Monte-Cristo
Movies.overview: A young man, falsely imprisoned by his jealous "friend", escapes and uses a hidden treasure to exact his revenge.

Movies.title: The Shunning
Movies.overview: Katie has longed for the forbidden things, but will her dreams come at a price too dear to pay? Why would Katie's mother, a simple Amish-woman, hide a beautiful baby dress in the attic? The staggering answers come on the eve of Katie's wedding with the arrival of a beautiful "Englisher" woman who has been searching for her, throwing Katie's life into confusion.

Movies.title: Infinity
Movies.overview: Real-life Nobel Prize-winning physicist Richard Feynman faces a moral crisis, as he tries to save his ailing wife’s life and work on the atomic bomb.

Movies.title: The Green Grass
Movies.overview: When a man’s money, success and power attracts attention, he must dig deep within himself to stop his life from spinning wildly out of control.

Movies.title: Break Every Chain
Movies.overview: Faced with the threat of losing his family and his job as a police officer, a depressed man turns to faith to find hope and redemption.

Movies.title: Invisible Child
Movies.overview: A nanny is hired to care for a child that exists only in the mind of a woman whose affluent family believes it’s best to enable her mental illness.

Movies.title: A Better Life
Movies.overview: In Los Angeles, an undocumented immigrant struggles to keep his son out of gang life while trying to earn more money for his family as a gardener.

Movies.title: The Ark
Movies.overview: This film is a unique retelling of the biblical story of Noah and the ark. A stellar cast that includes David Threlfall (Shameless), Joanne Whalley (The Borgias) and Ashley Walters (Hustle), The Ark is a timeless tale, a story of family, one man's faith, and his fixation with building an ark that may save his family and mankind.

Movies.title: North of Normal
Movies.overview: Having spent her early years in a wilderness commune founded by her anti-establishment grandfather, Cea is forced to shed her alternative upbringing and acclimatize to civilization when her mother, Michelle, tires of his chauvinistic reign.

Movies.title: Mountain Top
Movies.overview: A former lawyer returns to the courtroom to defend an eccentric old man, whose visions could reveal the truth about their small Appalachian town.

Movies.title: The 5th Quarter
Movies.overview: A teen proves his late brother’s legacy after a tragic car crash by wearing his old jersey and leading his school football team to historic victory.

Movies.title: The Last Dance
Movies.overview: A retired school teacher’s past is revealed after she is hospitalized and befriends her night nurse, who happens to be one of her former students.

Movies.title: Heaven's Door
Movies.overview: A girl mourning the loss of her grandparents and suffering from her parents’ divorce finds a portal to Heaven and is granted miraculous powers.

Movies.title: Expecting Amish
Movies.overview: A pregnant teen must decide whether to marry her boyfriend and stay in Amish country or reunite with the father of her child in Los Angeles.

Movies.title: Hiding in Plain Sight
Movies.overview: Darius and Josephine are forced to live out of their car with their two children. Darius begins to lose his faith until he crosses paths with a man who will make an unimaginable difference in his family's life.

Movies.title: Dunsmore
Movies.overview: When a bizarre murder occurs in a small Southern town, an attorney general investigator arrives and finds all the residents seem to have a motive.

Movies.title: Hardball
Movies.overview: Keanu Reeves stars as a desperate gambler forced to coach a lousy inner-city little-league baseball team for cash.

Movies.title: Desperate Riders
Movies.overview: Kansas Red, a loner hero, and Leslie, a tough-as-nails sharpshooter, team up to help a boy rescue his mom, who’s been taken by outlaws.

Movies.title: Saul: The Journey to Damascus
Movies.overview: As a dedicated leader, Saul fights to defend his faith and traditions, but while on a mission, he is blinded, forced to re-evaluate his beliefs.

Movies.title: Maggie's Passage
Movies.overview: A teenage girl runs away from the Christian family who adopted her after her father’s death, to find her birth mother, who is not what she hoped for.

Movies.title: The Man from Earth
Movies.overview: When colleagues throw a farewell bash for a retiring professor, the scholar reveals that he's had a stranger and far, far longer past than they knew.

Movies.title: And the Children Shall Lead
Movies.overview: A 12-year-old African-American girl and her white friends cross racial waters in an effort to ease deeply rooted tensions in 1960’s Mississippi.

Movies.title: Touchback
Movies.overview: 15 years after a devastating knee injury, a depressed former high school football star gets the chance of a lifetime: to go back and change history.

Movies.title: Snap Decision
Movies.overview: Inspired by a true story, a widowed mother is on trial for child pornography after she allows her daughters and friends to be photographed.

Movies.title: White Girl
Movies.overview: A college girl falls hard for a guy she's just met. After a night of partying goes wrong, she goes to wild extremes to get him back.

Movies.title: A Father's Legacy
Movies.overview: Un joven que huye de la ley encuentra su camino hacia la vida de un extraño. Conforme pasan los días, se dan cuenta de que se unieron por una razón.

Movies.title: East of the Mountains
Movies.overview: When he receives a terminal diagnosis, a widower takes his beloved dog on a final journey to the mountains where he met the love of his life.

Movies.title: Brothers of the Wind
Movies.overview: After discovering a struggling baby eagle, a boy helps nurture the animal and teaches it to fly, forming an unforgettable bond between them.

Movies.title: Draft Day
Movies.overview: It's NFL Draft Day and General Manager Sonny Weaver Jr. (Kevin Costner) faces the biggest decision of his life - the #1 pick. Will he pull off the draft of a lifetime or lose it all?

Movies.title: A Rumor of Angels
Movies.overview: Still grieving the tragic death of his mother, young James (Trevor Morgan) is sent to stay with his Uncle Charlie (Ron Livingston) on the Maine coast, where he meets an eccentric old woman (Vanessa Redgrave) who will change his life forever.

Movies.title: Hillbilly
Movies.overview: hillbilly seeks to expand understanding of Appalachia, tracing the evolution of the `hillbilly' stereotype in media and culture by connecting it to corporate exploitation of the region's natural resources.

Movies.title: Justin Bieber: Our World
Movies.overview: Award-winning filmmaker Michael D. Ratner records the final 30 days of preparation for a groundbreaking performance on the roof of the Beverly Hilton on New Year's Eve 2020.

Movies.title: The Imposter
Movies.overview: Three years after 13-year-old Nicholas Barclay vanished from San Antonio, his parents get a call from a boy in Spain claiming to be their missing son.

Movies.title: The Beatles: Magical Mystery Tour Memories
Movies.overview: The two musicians were viewed in entirely different lights, but actually had much in common. This doc delves into their personal and musical journeys.

Movies.title: The Witness
Movies.overview: The name "Kitty Genovese" became synonymous with urban apathy after "The New York Times" printed an article stating that she was stabbed to death during an attack that lasted more than half an hour, while 38 witnesses did nothing. Fifty years later, her brother uncovers a lie that transformed his life, condemned a city and defined an era.

Movies.title: About Face: Jewish Refugees in the Allied Forces
Movies.overview: How Jewish immigrants escaped the Nazis in Germany and Austria during World War II only to return to fight them as Allied soldiers and spies.

Movies.title: Green Day - VH1 Storytellers
Movies.overview: Featuring Green Day's first live film, Bullet in a Bible captures the explosive band on the biggest tour in it's career, in support of the Grammy-winning, quadruple-platinum, #1 charting "American Idiot" punk-rock epic

Movies.title: 100 Years of BMW
Movies.overview: The Bavarian Motor Works started out in 1916 as a small producer of aircraft engines. Yes, its origins lie in the air. The asset that BMW is best-known for today is actually the last product to be added to its portfolio.  It was only in the 30s that BMW built its first car. Since then, the company's 100-year history has seen technological innovations, racing victories and also severe crises.

Movies.title: Brad Pitt & Jennifer Aniston: Hollywood's Couple of the Year
Movies.overview: This documentary explores the sequences of events concerning A-listers Brad Pitt's and Jennifer Aniston's lives professional lives that led them to one another, and their relationship to the international spotlight.

Movies.title: Square One
Movies.overview: In light of new evidence, a filmmaker revisits the 1993 molestation case against Michael Jackson brought by the father of a 13-year-old boy.

Movies.title: Machine Gun Preacher Documentary
Movies.overview: The real-life story of Sam Childers, who changed his life of drugs and violence to missionary work in Africa as an iron-fist preacher of compassion.

Movies.title: Baraka
Movies.overview: This breathtaking, 70mm, transcendent global tour explores the sights and sounds of the human condition through the wonders of a world without words.

Movies.title: Fittest on Earth: A Decade of Fitness
Movies.overview: Learn what it took forty of the world’s top athletes to compete and win in the grueling, five-day competition that was the 2016 Reebok CrossFit Games.

Movies.title: Skin Deep: The Battle Over Morgellons
Movies.overview: People afflicted with a peculiar rare skin condition are often ignored by the medical community. One nurse searches for the truth about the disease.

Movies.title: Val
Movies.overview: Val Kilmer, one of Hollywood’s most mercurial actors has been documenting his life and craft through film. He has amassed thousands of hours of footage, from home movies made with his brothers, to time spent in iconic roles for blockbuster films like Top Gun & Batman. This raw and wildly original documentary reveals a life lived to extremes and a heart-filled look at what it means to be an artist.

Movies.title: The Secret World of LEGO
Movies.overview: Peek into the famously secretive world of LEGO, where a young design student pursues one of the most coveted jobs in the world: brick set designer.

Movies.title: Elvis Presley: From the Beginning to the End
Movies.overview: Using 42 years of rare footage, this is a warm, moving and sensitive tribute that offers a comprehensive and detailed biography of the King’s life.

Movies.title: Harry & Snowman
Movies.overview: Harry & Snowman is the Cinderella story of Dutch immigrant Harry deLeyer and his friendship with Snowman, an Amish plow horse he rescued off a truck bound for the glue factory. Within 2 years they would win the Triple Crown of show jumping, beating the nation's blue bloods and traveling the world as media darlings. Their meeting at a horse auction began a friendship that would last a lifetime.

Movies.title: Back in Time
Movies.overview: Explore the impact of the Back to the Future trilogy on a generation of moviegoers with the cast and creators of the time-travel classic.

Movies.title: Lost Soul: The Doomed Journey of Richard Stanley's Island of Dr. Moreau
Movies.overview: A look behind the scenes of the 1996 critical failure. Hollywood’s biggest stars and producers bet on this movie, so what went wrong?

Movies.title: Sasquatch Among Wildmen
Movies.overview: An esteemed professor of anthropology goes beyond the myths to study the scientific evidence to support the existence of ape-like humanoids.

Movies.title: Bones Brigade: An Autobiography
Movies.overview: The story of The Bones Brigade, a team of skateboarders whose work, skill, and passion transformed skateboarding from a pastime to a thrilling sport.

Movies.title: Marley
Movies.overview: Featuring never-before-seen footage, interviews, and unheard tracks, this documentary covers the life and legacy of reggae phenomenon Bob Marley.

Movies.title: Wildcat
Movies.overview: Wildcat follows the inspiring story of a young veteran on his journey into the Amazon. Once there, he meets a young woman running a wildlife rescue and rehabilitation center, and his life finds new meaning as he is entrusted with the life of an orphaned baby ocelot. What was meant to be an attempt to escape from life, turns out to be an unexpected journey of love, discovery, and healing.

Movies.title: Miles in the Life: The Story of a BMF Drug Trafficker
Movies.overview: Using the cover of an Atlanta limousine driver, Jabari Hayes trafficked large quantities of cocaine across the country for the then-largest African American drug organization in the southeast known as Black Mafia Family, often referred to as BMF.

Movies.title: Marilyn in Manhattan
Movies.overview: An exclusive look at Marilyn Monroe just before her tragic end.  Set in New York City in the 50's - It's a surprising documentary that captures the movie legend as she runs with Broadway pals from the Actors Studio.

Movies.title: Classic Albums: Phil Collins - Face Value
Movies.overview: A documentary examining the production of the album which turned Phil Collins into a solo star.

Movies.title: Barefoot Giants
Movies.overview: Los niños de unas comunidades indígenas moldean su vida en torno al basketball y aprenden a salir adelante a pesar del mundo adverso en el que viven.

Movies.title: Scotch: A Golden Dream
Movies.overview: For more than a century, Scotch whisky has been the premier international spirit of choice. Uisge beatha, Gaelic for "water of life”, is enjoyed in more than 200 countries, generating over $6 billion in exports each year. While capturing stunning Scottish landscapes, the real heart of the film is the fascinating people who make Scotch whisky. This includes the Cinderella tale of legendary master distiller Jim McEwan, an industry veteran who takes on a dilapidated distillery on his home island of Islay in the Inner Hebrides and turns it into an award-winning blend.

Movies.title: Battle for the Bulge
Movies.overview: Historical footage provides a unique retelling of the Battle for the Bulge, the last major German offensive on the Western Front during World War II.

Movies.title: Straight Up: Kentucky Bourbon
Movies.overview: Exploring the history of bourbon and the impact it has had on the state of Kentucky; the state has risen to become one of the most well-known places for the production of bourbon.

Movies.title: U2: Rockumentary
Movies.overview: What started as four teens dreaming of making records together became a worldwide phenomenon. Now, 45 years and 14 albums later, we look back.

Movies.title: The Drew: No Excuse, Just Produce
Movies.overview: Sports documentary about The Drew, America’s foremost pro-am basketball league, who rose up from the gang infested streets of South Central L.A.

Movies.title: Finding Happiness
Movies.overview: While visiting a spiritual community in California, an investigative journalist overcomes her skepticism to discover the secret to true happiness.

Movies.title: Ronaldo vs. Messi: Face Off!
Movies.overview: Including interviews and game footage, this documentary examines the lives and playing styles of two of the most gifted footballers.

Movies.title: Vater, Mutter, Hitler - Vier Tagebücher und eine Spurensuche
Movies.overview: After conquering Sudetenland, Czechoslovakia and Poland, on November 23, 1939, Hitler defied his generals to attack France and the UK—relying on his instincts over their counsel.

Movies.title: The Final Days of the Nazis
Movies.overview: A historical documentary that goes back to the final days of World War II, tracing what happened when the Third Reich fell.

Movies.title: Sasquatch Odyssey: The Hunt for Bigfoot
Movies.overview: This film is the story of the hunt for Bigfoot and the 4 Horsemen of Saquatchery, who have been searching for the creature for the last 40 years.

Movies.title: Rise of a Texas Bluesman: Stevie Ray Vaughan 1954-1983
Movies.overview: This film dissects Stevie Ray Vaughan's career and traces the history of Texas blues itself, identifying Vaughan's place within the larger tradition.

Movies.title: Ricky Martin: A Loco Life
Movies.overview: The child who began as a choir altar boy and sang fast food TV ads in Puerto Rico would later propel Latin pop to mainstream music. Ricky Martin's fascinating story shares his personal struggles on the way to the top of the charts. Some may call it "A Loco Life."

Movies.title: 20 Feet from Stardom
Movies.overview: Award-winning director Morgan Neville shines a spotlight on the untold true story of the backup singers behind some of the greatest musical legends of the 21st century.

Movies.title: Homeless in Los Angeles
Movies.overview: Featuring interviews with people living on the streets of Los Angeles, this vivid documentary shines a light on the harsh realities of homelessness.

Movies.title: Gimme Danger
Movies.overview: The Stooges' aggressive style of rock-n-roll blew a crater in the musical landscape of the late 1960s. Assaulting audiences with a blend of rock, blues, R and B, and free jazz, the band planted the seeds for what would be called punk and alternative rock in the decades that followed. Jim Jarmusch's Gimme Danger chronicles the story of The Stooges, one of the greatest rock-n-roll bands of all time.

Movies.title: Jose Canseco: The Truth Hurts
Movies.overview: Legendary baseball player and whistle blower Jose Canseco speaks out.

Movies.title: Picasso: The Legacy
Movies.overview: The life and loves of legendary painter and sculptor Pablo Picasso are profiled in this documentary. Across the 20th century, Picasso courted controversy and challenged norms to leave an unforgettable mark on the art world.

Movies.title: Life in the Doghouse
Movies.overview: The inspiring story of two men who have dedicated their lives and home to rescuing dogs and fostering them until they find an adoptive family.

Movies.title: Living with Chucky
Movies.overview: An in-depth look at the groundbreaking movie Child's Play from the perspective of a filmmaker who grew up inside the killer doll franchise.

Movies.title: Slash: Raised On the Sunset Strip
Movies.overview: The iconic rock guitarist opens up about his time in Guns N' Roses and beyond in this documentary featuring interviews with his fellow musicians.

Movies.title: The Secret Life of Snakes
Movies.overview: They are among the most hated and feared animals on the planet - only few people recognize their beauty. This documentary features some of Europe's most stunning species, like the European adder, the nose-horned viper, the dice snake, the ringed snake and the Aesculapian snake. After a winter safe in burrows, sometimes in bundles of hundreds, the spring's warmth brings them back to life.

Movies.title: El Chapo & Sean Penn: Bungle in the Jungle
Movies.overview: The sensational story behind Sean Penn’s meeting with Mexican drug lord El Chapo and the Hollywood figure pulling the strings behind the scenes.

Movies.title: The Elephant in the Living Room
Movies.overview: Praised by critics as one of the best films of the year, director Michael Webber exposes the controversial American subculture of raising wild predators as common household pets.

Movies.title: 1945: The Savage Peace
Movies.overview: When the Second World War ended, the people of liberated Europe celebrated their freedom from Nazi tyranny. Years of suffering had ended, but for millions of Germans, a new and terrible chapter was beginning. This remarkable history documentary reveals the appalling violence meted out to the defeated Germans, which mirrored some of the worst cruelty of Hitler's Nazi forces.

Movies.title: The Rival Princes of the Gulf
Movies.overview: A view of three Middle Eastern princes explores how their personal rivalry provokes conflict and destabilizes the most militarized zone in the world,

Movies.title: Streets of Plenty
Movies.overview: A filmmaker goes undercover as a homeless man for a month in North America’s most dangerous ghetto to experience life on the streets firsthand.

Movies.title: Now More than Ever: The History of Chicago
Movies.overview: The definitive guide to the “rock band with horns,” charting its rise in the late '60s to the chart-topping ‘70s and ‘80s, through the present day.

Movies.title: 1275 Days
Movies.overview: After a botched home invasion, 15-year-old Blake finds himself facing a virtual life prison sentence for felony murder. With the unwavering support of his single mother and teenage girlfriend, a David-and-Goliath uphill battle ensues in Elkhart, Indiana. They take on the system in hopes of a second chance.

Movies.title: Winston Churchill: Walking with Destiny
Movies.overview: The legacy of Winston Churchill is explored through his early opposition to the Nazi regime and his ascension to the Prime Minister’s office in 1940.

Movies.title: Fleetwood Mac - Unbroken Chain
Movies.overview: Sex, drugs, and rock ‘n’ roll pepper the story of the unique band that rose to fame with 1978’s “Rumours” album and endured 30 years of ups and downs.

Movies.title: Murder Capital of the World
Movies.overview: This documentary explores the crime that occurs during one year in Juarez, Mexico, including a vicious prison shootout and the rise of pot smuggling.

Movies.title: A Perfect Vintage
Movies.overview: Follow the journey of some of the world’s finest winemakers as they dance to the unpredictable rhythms of Mother Nature in pursuit of perfection.

Movies.title: P!nk: All I Know So Far
Movies.overview: A behind-the-scenes look at PInk as she balances family and life on the road, leading up to her first Wembley Stadium performance on 2019's Beautiful Trauma world tour.

Movies.title: The First American
Movies.overview: A documentary on America’s first President, George Washington, from ideas of self-government and the American Revolution to creating the Constitution.

Movies.title: Always at The Carlyle
Movies.overview: While the walls of the fabled NYC hotel don’t talk, they do whisper, unfolding stories of legendary people and moments shared by guests and employees.

Movies.title: Extreme Constructions: Suez Canal
Movies.overview: How would you go about doubling the width of the Suez Canal and deepening its main waterway? This documentary examines the major construction project.

Movies.title: The Ocean's 11 Story
Movies.overview: A behind-the-scenes look at how Frank Sinatra and his Rat Pack made a movie, did two shows a night, got a president elected and made the city of Las Vegas world famous while never letting the party stop.

Movies.title: Beyond The Spectrum: The Underground
Movies.overview: Phil Schneider died in 1996. Before his death he had been on tour across the United States speaking out about various subjects including his involvement with building a secret underground base in Dulce, New Mexico for the military. This documentary explores some of the information Phil Schneider spoke about to the public in the 1990's by examining each claim in detail.

Movies.title: Mega Yachts: The Latest Craze for Billionaires
Movies.overview: Billionaire businessmen throughout the world are fighting to possess the most original, flamboyant and magnificent yachts ever built, by their length, tonnage, design and technology. It is this exceptional world that we will reveal, filming ship-owners, shipyard managers and billionaires. Discover legendary ships, from Dubai to Monaco and Miami, but also in Groenland.

Movies.title: ZEF - The Story of Die Antwoord

Movies.title: Fame Kills: Princess Diana

She arrives in Paris with film producer Dodi Fayed, stopping there en route to London, having spent the preceding nine days together on board Fayed's yacht on the Italian and French Riviera. At 12:20 pm, Diana and Dodi departed from the Ritz Paris hotel rear entrance, heading for Dodi's father's apartment in Rue Arsène Houssaye. By doing this, they avoid a swarm of over thirty photographers waiting in front of the hotel. Three minutes later, after being chased by the paparazzi, the driver loses control of the vehicle and the car crashes. Diana's life was complicated, and it ended tragically. The fame and public admiration, although well intentioned is what ultimately killed her.

A deep discussion of pre-code Hollywood and its amoral roots, the censorship that “cleaned up” Hollywood and how the MPAA was formed leads into a discussion of how nudity changed cinematic culture through the decades. But the only way to get to them is through a city full of terrifying undead mutants...

Movies.overview: A medical student sets out to recreate his decapitated fiancée by building her a new body made from parts of New York City street prostitutes.

Movies.title: Pumpkinhead II: Blood Wings
Movies.overview: In a small Kansas town in 1958, a group of teenagers torture and kill a disfigured orphan named Tommy. After 35 years, another gang of teens robs the cabin of an old witch. Using some blood and a spell taken from her house, the teens inadvertently resurrect Tommy's soul in the form of the demon Pumpkinhead. Enraged, Pumpkinhead goes after the teens who summoned him and the men who killed Tommy.

Movies.title: Escape: Puzzle of Fear
Movies.overview: Matthew va a un Escape Room para pasar una noche divertida, solo para descubrir que está atrapado con amigos que quieren hacerle pagar por su pasado.

Movies.title: Mid-Century
Movies.overview: A husband and wife's weekend getaway in a mid-century style rental turns deadly when the husband discovers the owner is a psychopath with a backyard of buried secrets and designs on his wife.

Movies.title: Rats
Movies.overview: A journalist tries to break a major story about the elite's secrets, but she instead finds herself in a fight for her life against a group of vermin.

Movies.title: The Divine Fury
Movies.overview: A boy rejects Christianity when his father dies. As an adult prizefighter, he is a top success until a demonic wound appears in his hand.

Movies.title: Stepfather 3
Movies.overview: A wheelchair-bound boy uses his computer skills to investigate the true identity of the menacing figure romancing his divorced mother.

Movies.title: Zombiology: Enjoy Yourself Tonight
Movies.overview: When the zombie apocalypse comes to town, a pair of deadbeat friends step up to become the heroes who can cut through the chaos and battle the undead.

Movies.title: Jurassic Domination
Movies.overview: When two military-made, weaponized dinosaurs attack a small town, it’s up to the sheriff to stop the creatures before they wreak havoc nationwide.

Movies.title: Piranhaconda
Movies.overview: Two piranha/anaconda hybrid creatures hunt down the scientist who stole their egg and a film crew; making a slasher film in the jungle.

Movies.title: Maniac Cop 2
Movies.overview: A formerly heroic cop returns from the dead and joins forces with a psychotic serial killer to destroy his enemies and settle scores.

Movies.title: Angel Eyes
Movies.overview: Molly, a stunning but mysterious woman who captivates a small desert town. As bartender Steve falls for her, he uncovers deadly secrets. With murders mounting, Steve must decide if she's an angel-or something far more dangerous.

Movies.title: Black Mountain Side
Movies.overview: When archaeologists find an ancient ruin in the Canadian wilderness, their communication system fails, unleashing the terrors that attend seclusion.

Movies.title: Alien Country
Movies.overview: Reeling from the news of an unexpected pregnancy, Jimmy and Everly unknowingly release an alien invasion in their small town and learn to work together in order to save each other, their town and evidently, the entire galaxy.

Movies.title: Phantom Racer
Movies.overview: A racecar driver, whose rival  perished in a fiery crash, becomes prime suspect in a series of murders, but could the real killer have already died?

Movies.title: Stepfather 2
Movies.overview: An escaped psychopath impersonates a marriage counselor and will stop at nothing to court one of his patients and win over her young son.

Movies.title: Backwoods
Movies.overview: A paintball retreat in the North Carolina mountains for a group of L.A. video game execs becomes a fight for survival against maniacal locals.

Movies.title: Forget Me Not
Movies.overview: As popular Sandy gets ready for graduation week, her friends start to disappear one by one, as a vengeful spirit attempts to settle the score.

Movies.title: The Slumber Party Massacre
Movies.overview: In this cult horror classic, a maniac on the loose takes his weapon of choice, a huge power drill, to a gathering of unsuspecting young women.

Movies.title: The Innkeepers
Movies.overview: The last two employees of a century-old hotel in New England try to prove it’s truly haunted just as sinister guests start to check in and alarm them.

Movies.title: The Evil Down the Street
Movies.overview: Inspired by true events, a family moves into their dream home having no idea it is possessed by a demon until one member becomes its vessel.

Movies.title: Subject 101
Movies.overview: A homeless refugee looks for a fresh start at a European multinational temp agency, but, unbeknownst to him, they have different plans lined up.

Movies.title: The House That Dripped Blood
Movies.overview: Robert Bloch, the author of Psycho, presents a quartet of terrifying tales.

Movies.title: Room for Rent
Movies.overview: After a lonely widow falls for the young man staying at her house, she takes drastic measures to ensure that they can be together.

Movies.title: Deathwatch
Movies.overview: An abandoned enemy trench isn't a refuge for a handful of British soldiers, as the men find themselves hunted by an unseen stalker.

Movies.title: Operation Blood Hunt
Movies.overview: A mission to unlock the mystery of missing Marines in the South Pacific in 1944 sends a team of military rejects into the belly of the literal beast.

Movies.title: Asylum: Twisted Horror and Fantasy Tales
Movies.overview: This collection of terrifying stories includes a clown preparing to give his last show, a ruthless stalker, and a husband who just won’t stay dead.

Movies.title: Navy Seals vs. Zombies
Movies.overview: Navy SEALS find themselves in Baton Rouge, embarking on the battle of their lives, when a dreadful epidemic brings them face-to-face with the undead.

Movies.title: Night of the Living Dead 3D
Movies.overview: In the re-imagining of the original 1968 film, this update follows a group of survivors trapped in a farmhouse battling a siege of undead zombies!

Movies.title: Turbo Kid
Movies.overview: Welcome to a post-apocalyptic 1997, where an orphaned teenager must rescue his robot friend from a warlord who controls the water supply.

Movies.title: Dawn of the Beast
Movies.overview: A group of grad students deep in the Northwest forest looking for Bigfoot come against a deadlier legend that is determined to wipe them out.

Movies.title: Megaboa
Movies.overview: A group of college kids who head into the Colombian rainforest to look for cave drawings find an extinct 50-foot boa constrictor lurking in the brush.

Movies.title: Cupid

Movies.title: Bornless Ones
Movies.overview: Having just moved to a remote home near an institution to better care for her brother Zach, Emily invites a few friends over to help her unpack. They soon discover strange symbols etched into the boards on the windows. In an effort to clean the house they clear them away, soon realizing the gravity of their mistake as they one by one become possessed by an evil force.

Movies.title: The Demonologist
Movies.overview: A string of inexplicable murders draws a detective down a dark path to his past and the occult, where evil forces try to bring forth Hell on Earth.

Movies.title: The Greasy Strangler
Movies.overview: Big Ronnie and his son Big Brayden run Big Ronnie's Disco Walking Tour, the best and only disco walking tour in Los Angeles. During one tour both men take a fancy to Janet, a curvy, curly redhead who takes a shine to a disbelieving Brayden. The two begin a whirlwind courtship much to Ronnie's dismay.

Movies.title: 14 Cameras
Movies.overview: A family rents a beautiful summer home, only to discover that their oddball landlord is broadcasting the most private moments of their lives online.

Movies.title: 13 Cameras
Movies.overview: Newlyweds Ryan and Claire are thrilled to move into their new home but soon realize that their grim and salacious landlord has been spying on them.

Movies.title: American Carnage
Movies.overview: When the Governor issues an order to arrest the children of undocumented immigrants, they’re offered a chance to have their charges dropped by volunteering to provide care to the elderly. Once inside the facility, however, they discover that the Governor and the facility's supervisor have cooked up a horrifyingly depraved conspiracy that endangers the young and the old.

Movies.title: Dawning of the Dead
Movies.overview: While a virus that causes the dead to reanimate brings the world to its knees, a group of survivors must fight their way through a horde of biologically transformed undead in order to escape and help save the world.

Movies.title: The Alpha Test
Movies.overview: After suffering at the hands of its entitled suburban family masters, a robot servant finally blows its fuse and starts a violent A.I. revolution.

Movies.title: My Best Friend's Exorcism

Movies.title: Bad Moon
Movies.overview: By day, Ted Harrison is a successful photojournalist visiting family in the Pacific Northwest. By night, he transforms into a horrific half-human.

Movies.title: Split Second

Movies.title: Chasing the Devil

In the end only this disturbing footage survives which likely endangers the viewer, marking them as the next victim of this powerful and evil force. Be careful what you chase - you just might end up catching it.

Movies.title: Maniac Cop
Movies.overview: When a killer dressed in a police uniform begins murdering innocent people on the streets of New York City, a young cop becomes the chief suspect.

Movies.title: The Unhealer
Movies.overview: A spiritual healing gone wrong turns a relentlessly bullied teenager into a super-powered killing machine just as his tormentors do the unthinkable.

Movies.title: The Monkey's Paw
Movies.overview: Jake is given a mystical monkey's paw that grants three wishes, but things go terribly wrong when he brings his friend back from the dead.

Movies.title: Watchers
Movies.overview: A boy takes in a stray dog, later discovering that it is an ultra-intelligent runaway being stalked by a dangerous creature from the same genetic research lab.

Movies.title: Sleep Tight
Movies.overview: A doorman with a fetish for gaslighting his residents targets the building’s cheeriest tenant, determined to ruin her life by any means necessary.

Movies.title: Red Flags
Movies.overview: Christine French becomes deeply in love with a man only to discover that he may be a serial killer. She must look closer at the man she calls husband, but will what she finds destroy her white picket fence?

Movies.title: Sleepaway Camp
Movies.overview: Following the death of her family, Angela is sent to a camp for the summer. After her arrival, brutal accidents begin to kill the other campers.

Movies.title: Demon Eye
Movies.overview: In her father's countryside home, a young woman discovers an amulet that will grant her greatest wish, but in return, unlocks two deadly demons.

The rapidly-spreading infection propels an authentic family drama, drawing mordant parallels to real-world social horrors.

Movies.title: Creature from Black Lake
Movies.overview: Two graduate students travel to the Louisiana swamps in the hopes of documenting a Bigfoot-like creature that is terrorizing the locals.

Movies.title: The Stuff
Movies.overview: Nobody can say what’s in a popular new dessert, but the tasty goo is causing a sensation—and having horrifying, zombie-like effects on consumers.

Movies.title: Mortuary
Movies.overview: Christie Parson suspects her father’s recent drowning was no accident but, as she gets closer to the truth, she discovers a darker secret.

Movies.title: Murder of Innocence
Movies.overview: Laurie Wasserman seemingly has everything a girl could want. Unfortunately she has a slim grasp on reality, becoming increasingly disturbed each day.

Movies.title: The Magnetic Monster
Movies.overview: A cult-favorite of the ‘50s schlock sci-fi era that takes on nuclear radiation in a realistic way as a magnetic substance threatens to destroy Earth.

Movies.title: The Stepfather
Movies.overview: After murdering his entire family, a man remarries a widow with a teenage daughter in another town and prepares to do the same thing all over again.

Movies.title: Terror by Night
Movies.overview: A Holmes lo contratan para evitar el robo de un enorme diamante durante un viaje en tren. En el trayecto, hay un asesinato y la piedra desaparece.

Movies.title: Black as Night
Movies.overview: A resourceful teenage girl driven by revenge, alongside her trusted friends, spends her summer battling vampires terrorizing her city of New Orleans. Part of the Welcome to the Blumhouse collection.

Movies.title: Waxwork
Movies.overview: Several friends are invited to a wax museum after hours, where they discover that the wax figures are alive — and ready for them to join the exhibit.

Movies.title: Deus Irae
Movies.overview: Father Javier lives a fractured existence: on one side, he assists families who claim to have witnessed miracles, and on the other he is part of a trio of excommunicated priests who hunt the possessed down to exorcize them under their own terms: with Bibles, fire and shotguns.

Movies.title: Anna
Movies.overview: After stealing a possessed doll, Jacob and Shawn are trapped and forced to do its bidding as it wants women to kill...

Movies.title: The Harvesting
Movies.overview: A young family from the city travels to Amish Country where a malevolent presence threatens to tear them apart by exposing their dark secrets.

Movies.title: The Sleep Experiment
Movies.overview: Two detectives look into a disastrous secret military experiment where five prisoners were kept awake for thirty days in a sealed gas chamber.

Movies.title: The Day
Movies.overview: In a post-apocalyptic future, a small group of survivors make a desperate, final stand against a horde of cannibals over 24 hours.

Movies.title: Evil Bong
Movies.overview: A vintage bong transports all who hit from it to Bong World, an alternate realm where deadly, exotic strippers kill stoners with pleasure.

Movies.title: Goodnight Mommy
Movies.overview: Young twin brothers vow to protect each other when their mother comes home with her face obscured by bandages, which makes them question her identity.

Movies.title: Hollows Grove
Movies.overview: A young filmmaker takes on a deadly project when he follows a ghost hunters on an investigation of an abandoned orphanage rumored to be haunted.

But when they stumble upon the haunting exorcism of an innocent girl and secretly bring her back to their resort, paradise is quickly turned upside down. As night falls, a horrific discovery about the child blurs the line between their reality and the local folklore of the woods.

Movies.title: Cropsey
Movies.overview: Realizing the urban legend of their youth has actually come true; two filmmakers delve into the mystery surrounding five missing children and the real-life boogeyman linked to their disappearances.

Movies.title: Swallowed

Movies.title: Nick Knight

Movies.title: Gehenna: Where Death Lives

Movies.title: You Can't Run Forever

Wade fixates on Eddie, leaving Miranda momentarily free to escape, but he quickly turns his relentless focus on her. Wade proves to be an ever-present threat, staying one step ahead and relentlessly pursuing anyone who dares to aid her.

Movies.title: Adopting Terror
Movies.overview: When the Broadbent’s adopt a baby girl, they couldn't be more thrilled. Until the child’s biological father takes violent steps to get her back.

Movies.title: Blood Monkey
Movies.overview: A renowned but mad professor leads a group of American students to Africa to investigate a tribe of killer chimpanzees rumored to be the missing link.

Movies.title: La Casa
Movies.overview: Based on a true story, a cop working in Chile during its 1980s political upheaval gets trapped in a cursed house by evil and hateful spirits at work.

Movies.title: Nekrotronic
Movies.overview: After uncovering an omen of the Antichrist’s rise, an exorcist recruits assassins to kill any of Satan's minions capable of becoming his vessel.

Movies.title: Attack of the Killer Donuts
Movies.overview: A chemical accident turns ordinary donuts into bloodthirsty killers. Now it's up to three friends to save their sleepy town.

Movies.title: Animal
Movies.overview: A vicious, bloodthirsty predator traps a group of friends (Keke Palmer, Jeremy Sumpter, Elizabeth Gillies) in an isolated cabin.

Movies.title: Love Hurts
Movies.overview: Six strangers are invited to a dinner party by a charming and enigmatic host, lured by the promise of substantial financial reward if they last the whole evening. However, all is not what it seems.

Movies.title: C.H.U.D.
Movies.overview: A photographer and his girlfriend become aware of a conspiracy involving a corrupt official and cannibalistic monsters, who dwell in NYC’s sewers.

Movies.title: Warlock
Movies.overview: A 17th century witch hunter follows an evil being into the 20th century, where a young woman assists him in the capture of the wicked entity.

Movies.title: Finders Keepers
Movies.overview: A divorced mother's life is thrown into turmoil when her daughter becomes obsessed with an evil doll left behind by their home's previous occupants.

Movies.title: Butchers Book Three: Bonesaw

Pippa’s refuge is violently invaded when an armed thief, Kayleigh (Eliza Bennett), breaks in and takes Pippa hostage. Alfie Allen (Game of Thrones), plays Kayleigh’s increasingly hapless partner-in-crime who soon realises he is way out of his depth.

Movies.title: Elvira: Mistress of the Dark
Movies.overview: With dreams of performing in Las Vegas, a buxom former TV hostess finds herself in trouble when she travels to a small town to claim her inheritance.

Movies.title: Galaxy of Terror
Movies.overview: Neurotic astronauts (Edward Albert, Erin Moran, Ray Walston) face a giant worm and other monsters on a distant planet.

Movies.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Movie

Movies.title: Abduction
Movies.overview: A SWAT team member with both amnesia and a kidnapped daughter works with a hitman whose wife was abducted to find the culprits behind the crimes.

Movies.title: The Amityville Playhouse
Movies.overview: After the death of her parents, a young woman inherits an old theater in the town of Amityville, where she  uncovers an ancient evil hiding within.

Movies.title: Ni tuyo, ni mía
Movies.overview: Amanda se da cuenta de que su perfecto marido está teniendo una aventura. En lugar de confrontarlo, se une al amante de su esposo para comprender qué salió mal y reconquistarlo.

Movies.title: Bigfoot: Grip of the Monster
Movies.overview: Twenty years after writing about a terrifying Bigfoot encounter, a bestselling author returns to the scene of the incident in Maine’s northern woods.

Movies.title: Transylvania 6-5000

Movies.title: Willow Creek

Movies.title: The Remains

Movies.title: Vampires Suck

Becca isn't the only high-school student having a hard time with boys; her friends are all desperate to find a date for the prom, and as the big night draws near, the rampant tension draws out the animals in everyone.

Movies.title: Repo! The Genetic Opera
Movies.overview: In 2056, an epidemic of organ failures devastates the planet and those who cannot afford their treatments are hunted by villainous Repo Men.

Movies.title: Teeth
Movies.overview: During a traumatic assault, a repressed teen finds out her vagina has protective teeth and uses this discovery as a source of empowerment and revenge.

Movies.title: Trucks
Movies.overview: It’s man against machine in this Stephen King-penned joy ride in which a small truck stop town is conquered by a mob of homicidal autonomous trucks.

Movies.title: Exorcist Vengeance
Movies.overview: A no-nonsense troubled priest takes an assignment from the Vatican to expel a killer demon from a house full of incorrigible and deadly suspects.

Movies.title: Kill Game
Movies.overview: Haunted by a prank-gone-wrong, the privileged and popular of Grace Harbor face a mysterious serial killer seeking revenge. Who's laughing now?

Movies.title: Dogman
Movies.overview: When pets begin dying, then wild animals, and human victims follow, a farm couple and a Native American trace a deadly bacteria to a strange killer.

Movies.title: The Stakelander
Movies.overview: HIs family murdered and his village destroyed by the Brotherhood, Martin retreats into the American badlands to find his former vampire hunter mentor.

Movies.title: Drawn Into the Night
Movies.overview: Un policía encubierto se hace pasar por estudiante después de que varias chicas desaparecen. Ahora ella está en una lucha por su vida.

Movies.title: Shark Attack 3: Megalodon
Movies.overview: Marine researchers discover a colossal shark tooth off the Mexican coast and realize the most menacing beast that ever ruled the ocean is still alive.

Movies.title: House of Fears
Movies.overview: A few hours of spooky fun sneaking into a haunted house become a nightmare as six friends are trapped inside with no way out -- and they aren't alone.

Movies.title: From the Dark
Movies.overview: When a young couple gets stranded on a country road, they seek shelter in an abandoned ramshackle farmhouse where a nocturnal creature awaits.

Movies.title: The Girl Who Cried Her Eyes Out
Movies.overview: When a group of friends sneak into a state park to party, a dare brings them face to face with a legendary disturbed spirit who's out for revenge.

Movies.title: While the Children Sleep
Movies.overview: When a wealthy California couple hires a new nanny, she seems too good to be true — that is, until their friends and neighbors begin dying one by one.

Movies.title: Megalodon: The Frenzy
Movies.overview: After surviving a megalodon attack, a ship's crew are once again imperiled as a frenzy of five of the giant creatures torments the open ocean.

Movies.title: The Cradle Will Fall
Movies.overview: Una fiscal investiga el suicidio de una mujer embarazada en un hospital y descubre una compleja red de engaños y un médico asesino.

Movies.title: Hellbound: Hellraiser II
Movies.overview: This brutal sequel follows Kristy, as she is brought to an institution. The facilities won't keep her safe from the return of a certain demon.

Movies.title: Unnatural
Movies.overview: A group of unsuspecting cabin dwellers get trapped in a horrifying game of cat and mouse when a genetically-modified creature escapes into the wild.

Movies.title: The Howling
Movies.overview: After a near-fatal clash with a serial killer, a newswoman retreats to a mountain resort where residents may guard the secret of a mythical monster.

Movies.title: Jeruzalem
Movies.overview: While visiting the ancient walls of the Holy City, two American young women and an anthropology student must survive a biblical apocalypse.

Movies.title: The Girl Who Got Away
Movies.overview: A killer who has ended the lives of four young girls escapes from prison to go after the fifth victim, who got away from her years earlier.

Movies.title: Cell
Movies.overview: Based on the Stephen King thriller, a graphic novelist desperately searches for his son when a cell phone signal turns ordinary people into killers.

Movies.title: Init!ation
Movies.overview: A murder during pledge week ignites a spree of sinister social media messages and a race against time to stop a killer before he strikes again.

Movies.title: What Lurks Beneath
Movies.overview: As the USS Titan crew faces World War III, a mysterious naked stowaway in a torpedo tube reveals a far greater danger beyond Russia.

Movies.title: Stake Land
Movies.overview: After the U.S.A endures a bloodsucking plague, a vampire hunter takes a Midwestern survivor of an attack on a bold quest for peace from the undead.

Movies.title: The Retreat
Movies.overview: A weekend among gay friends at an isolated woodland cabin turns into a fight to the death against a band of homophobes who hunt and torture for sport.

Movies.title: The Sword and the Sorcerer
Movies.overview: A mercenary with a three-bladed sword rediscovers the dangerous future of his royal heritage when he is recruited to help a princess save her land.

Movies.title: Ticks
Movies.overview: A group of troubled teenagers are led by social workers on a California wilderness retreat where they encounter a horde of bloodthirsty mutated ticks.

Movies.title: The Changed
Movies.overview: A group of ordinary people band together in a suburban community to battle the imposters who have replaced their families, friends and neighbors.

Movies.title: Dominion: Prequel to The Exorcist
Movies.overview: Years before Father Lankester Merrin exorcized Pazuzu from Regan MacNeil's soul, he first encounters the King of the Evil Wind Demons in East Africa.

Movies.title: Lake Mungo

Movies.title: Goodnight Mommy
Movies.overview: When twin brothers arrive home to find their mother's demeanour altered and her face covered in surgical bandages, they begin to suspect the woman beneath the gauze is not who she says she is.

Movies.title: Where the Scary Things Are
Movies.overview: In this teen horror tale, Ayla and her friends discover a human monster and use it to shoot popular viral videos—but soon Ayla uses the beast to take revenge on her enemies.

Movies.title: Saturn 3
Movies.overview: Lovers who dwell on a space station amidst Saturn’s asteroid fields are invaded by an ambitious technocrat from Earth and his giant, evil robot.

Movies.title: Amityville: The Awakening
Movies.overview: In order to save money for medical expenses, a single mother moves her three children into a notoriously haunted house, unaware of its bloody history.

Movies.title: The Wild Man of the Navidad
Movies.overview: From the creator of The Texas Chainsaw Massacre, this vintage horror tells the chilling story of a rural Texas town terrified by a mysterious beast.

Movies.title: Exeter
Movies.overview: During an all-night party at an abandoned asylum, a group of teens dabble in the occult and unleash an evil spirit that turns them against each other.

Movies.title: Candyman: Day of the Dead
Movies.overview: A distant, living relative of the terrifying urban legend known as Candyman tries to stop his string of brutal murders once and for all.

Movies.title: Death of Me
Movies.overview: The terror starts after a vacationing couple wakes up from a night they don’t remember and finds clues in a video that shows one murdering the other.

Movies.title: FearDotCom
Movies.overview: A detective and a health researcher try to solve a series of murders in which the victims all logged into a website run by an anonymous sadist.

Movies.title: Slugs
Movies.overview: A sleepy Midwestern community is terrorized by mutated slug-like creatures that crave flesh. Can these slimy monsters be stopped?

Movies.title: Bad Nun: Deadly Vows
Movies.overview: Soon after Catherine moves her family into the local converted church, a nun begins appearing at night and terrorizes them in pursuit of their souls.

Movies.title: Killer Legends
Movies.overview: Filmmakers Joshua Zeman and Rachel Mills embark on a dark journey as they investigate four of our most terrifying urban legends and the true crimes that may have inspired them.

Movies.title: Snow Falls
