Movies.title: Alien Invasion
Movies.overview: A journalist and a ranger venture into a dangerous forest to track an extraterrestrial life-form in an abandoned military barrack.

Movies.title: Unhinged
Movies.overview: Four American best friends decide to take the back roads traveling to a wedding in England. On the way, things take a deadly turn.

Movies.title: The Ritual: Black Nun
Movies.overview: A pregnant British woman living an expat life in Cambodia must defeat an ancient and evil curse to save her unborn baby—or die trying.

Movies.title: Jekyll and Hyde
Movies.overview: When Dr. Henry Jekyll is accused of a gruesome murder, his close friend’s investigation leads to a shocking discovery inside the killer’s mind.

Movies.title: Curse of Crom: The Legend of Halloween
Movies.overview: When high schoolers accidentally release an ancient Irish entity into their hometown, they have until midnight on Halloween to stop it.

Movies.title: Haunt
Movies.overview: On Halloween, friends stumble upon a haunted house, leading to a deadly night, as they discover some horrors aren't mere nightmares.

Movies.title: The Descent
Movies.overview: A spelunking trip turns to horror when a cave collapse entombs a group of friends in darkness, making them prey to the flesh-eating creatures below.

Movies.title: I Spit on Your Grave
Movies.overview: After surviving a brutal rape, a woman takes the law into her own hands by seeking revenge against her attackers in this remake of the cult classic.

Movies.title: Boogeyman 2
Movies.overview: A young woman with a life-long and phobic loathing of the boogeyman checks herself into a mental health clinic in the hope of finally facing her fears.

Movies.title: The Jazz Singer
Movies.overview: A young, Jewish man defies tradition and risks everything to pursue his goal of becoming a star, falling for the one woman who believes in him.

Movies.title: Catching Faith 2: The Homecoming
Movies.overview: Everything seems to be going wrong for the Taylor family right now. Just as Alexa is starting work at her dream job, she's overwhelmed by caring for her mother suffering from Alzheimer's disease. Her son, Beau, has just lost his professional football career to an injury and her daughter, Ravyn, needs help planning her last-minute wedding. Only with the support of friends and the guiding grace of their faith can the Taylors find the strength to cope with the tidal wave of drama and tragedy that is rolling over their lives.

Movies.title: Sugarhouse
Movies.overview: Abandoned by their outlaw father, Maisie and her headstrong sister turn to their troubled brother for help-unwittingly setting off a chain of events that unearth long-buried family secrets hidden within the sugarhouse.

Movies.title: Catching Faith
Movies.overview: After a high school football star gets caught drinking, he and his family are at a crossroads in their faith. They must rely on God for guidance.

Movies.title: Alien Outpost
Movies.overview: In this pulse-pounding thriller, an elite unit of soldiers is charged with protecting a strategic outpost while under siege from an alien invasion.

Movies.title: Cartas a Elena
Movies.overview: Cuando se queda lisiado un cartero, Emilio, su hijo adoptado, se hace cargo del correo y haciendo gala de una gran imaginación cambia el contenido de las cartas sustituyendo las historias tristes por historias alegres y optimistas.

Movies.title: Bridget Jones's Baby
Movies.overview: Oscar winners Renée Zellweger and Colin Firth are joined by Patrick Dempsey for the next chapter of the world’s favourite singleton.  This third instalment in the beloved comedy series finds Bridget unexpectedly expecting.

Movies.title: The Neon Demon
Movies.overview: When aspiring model Jesse (Elle Fanning) moves to Los Angeles, her youth and vitality are devoured by a group of beauty-obsessed women who will use any means necessary to get what she has. From the visionary director Nicolas Winding Refn (Drive), THE NEON DEMON is a visceral, stylish and wickedly original feast for the eyes.

Movies.title: Bye Bye Barry
Movies.overview: When NFL superstar Barry Sanders vanished at the height of his career, he left the NFL world in shock. He was still in his prime, chasing the all-time NFL rushing record when he boarded a flight to England and never stepped foot on the field again. Now, 24 years later, Barry retraces his steps through the streets of London to finally confront the mystery.

Movies.title: Sitting in Bars with Cake
Movies.overview: Inspired by true events, Sitting in Bars with Cake follows two best friends in their 20s navigating life in L.A. Extrovert Corinne convinces Jane, a shy, talented baker, to commit to a year of bringing cakes to bars, to help her meet people and build confidence. But when Corinne receives a life-altering diagnosis, the pair faces a challenge unlike anything they’ve experienced before.

Movies.title: One Night in Miami...
Movies.overview: A fictional account of one night where American icons gathered to discuss their roles in the Civil Rights Movement and cultural upheaval of the 1960s.

Movies.title: Madres
Movies.overview: Expecting their first child, a Mexican-American couple move to a migrant farming community in 1970's California where strange symptoms and terrifying visions threaten their new family. Part of the Welcome to the Blumhouse collection.

Movies.title: Chemical Hearts
Movies.overview: 17-year-old Henry Page is the editor of his high school newspaper and hopes to become a successful writer one day; his secret: he has never been in love, yet he dreams of the great and romantic love story that fulfils and inspires him.

Movies.title: Maxine's Baby: The Tyler Perry Story
Movies.overview: Tyler Perry is America’s consummate multihyphenate. But underneath this entertainment behemoth is a man working humbly to heal his childhood trauma by transforming his pain into promise. Maxine’s Baby: The Tyler Perry Story, a nod to his mother’s love, is an intimate portrait of visionary Tyler Perry and his harrowing but faithful road to the top of an industry that didn’t always include him.

Movies.title: Sound of Metal
Movies.overview: Metal drummer Ruben begins to lose his hearing. When a doctor tells him his condition will worsen, he thinks his career and life is over. His girlfriend Lou checks the former addict into a rehab for the deaf hoping it will prevent a relapse and help him adapt to his new life. After being welcomed and accepted just as he is, Ruben must choose between his new normal and the life he once knew.

Movies.title: Lucy and Desi
Movies.overview: Lucille Ball and Desi Arnaz form an unlikely partnership to become one of the most prolific power couples in Hollywood.

Movies.title: Master
Movies.overview: Three women strive to find their place at an elite Northeastern university as old as the country. When anonymous racist attacks target a Black freshman - who insists she is being haunted by ghosts of the school's past - each woman must determine where the real menace lies.

Movies.title: Honey Boy
Movies.overview: When 12-year-old Otis starts to find success as a child television star in Hollywood, his ex-rodeo-clown father returns to serve as his guardian. When Otis isn't on set charming audiences, he spends his days with his father at an extended-stay motel on the edge of the city, enduring his overbearing father's abuse. HONEY BOY follows two threads of time, watching father and son's contentious rela..

Movies.title: The Vast of Night
Movies.overview: In the twilight of the 1950s, on one fateful night in New Mexico, a young switchboard operator Fay (Sierra McCormick) and charismatic radio DJ Everett (Jake Horowitz) discover a strange audio frequency that could change their small town and the future forever.

Movies.title: The Manor
Movies.overview: After suffering a mild stroke, Judith Albright reluctantly moves into a historic nursing home where she becomes convinced a supernatural force is killing the residents. Part of the Welcome to the Blumhouse collection.

Movies.title: Silver Dollar Road
Movies.overview: Silver Dollar Road follows the story of the Reels family who are valiantly attempting to protect the land their family bought one generation after slavery. This documentary, based on the 2019 ProPublica article, highlights the covert ways the legal system has been exploited to keep Black land ownership fragile and the racial wealth gap growing.

Movies.title: The Dressmaker
Movies.overview: Tilly returns to her hometown to find her mother, Mad Molly, demented. Tilly is an outsider, accused of murder and turned upon by insular locals.

Movies.title: The Report
Movies.overview: FBI agent Daniel Jones performs an exhaustive investigation into the CIA's use of torture on suspected terrorists.

Movies.title: On a Wing and a Prayer
Movies.overview: When the pilot of their private plane dies mid-flight, a man facing a crisis of faith must take the reins and save his entire family on Easter Sunday.

Movies.title: Cinderella
Movies.overview: Ambitious orphan Cinderella gets some magical help from her Fab G to realise her dreams, making a life for herself selling her signature dresses.

Movies.title: The Way Ahead
Movies.overview: A British Lieutenant strictly prepares a group of drafted recruits during World War II in advance of an upcoming North African deployment for battle.

Movies.title: The Wereth Eleven
Movies.overview: This World War II documentary honors the 1.2 million African Americans who bravely served in America's Armed Forces and fought for freedom.

Movies.title: Lancaster Skies
Movies.overview: A Spitfire Ace pilot,  shattered from his duties in the Royal Air Force, makes it his mission to join the Bomber Command to fight the Nazis by air.

Movies.title: The Ninth Day
Movies.overview: In February 1942, Abbé Henri Kremer, a priest from Luxembourg, is released from the Dachau concentration camp and sent home. Kremer soon expects the Nazis are displaced with his bishop for refusing to cooperate with the German occupation forces. Under pressure of the Gestapo, Kremer gets nine days - or he must return to the living hell he just escaped from. German with English subtitles.

Movies.title: The Impossible Spy
Movies.overview: La vida tranquila de un hombre de familia cambia radicalmente cuando, a los 35 años de edad, lo recluta el servicio secreto de Israel.

Movies.title: Freaks Out
Movies.overview: Set in Rome during World War II, a group of four circus freaks with supernatural powers become the target of a 12-fingered Nazi.

Movies.title: The Rotterdam Bombing
Movies.overview: In 1940, a struggling young man falls for a girl who must pay a terrible price to save her mentally disabled brother by marrying a shrewd businessman.

Movies.title: Torpedo: U-235
Movies.overview: As World War II rages, a Resistance squad flees the German Navy’s hot pursuit of an atomic Nazi submarine the team hijacked to bring to the U.S.

Movies.title: Beyond the Line
Movies.overview: In the final days of the war, two Allied soldiers find themselves trapped behind enemy lines and struggle to survive as the Nazis begin closing in.

Movies.title: Legions
Movies.overview: In 1914 at the dawn of World War I, a deserter-turned-warrior and an intelligence agent sacrifice everything to secure Poland's sovereignty.

Movies.title: 15 Minutes of War
Movies.overview: Inspired by the 1976 Somalian rebel hijacking of a school bus of 21 French children and their American teacher and the rescue operation that followed.

Movies.title: I Am Soldier
Movies.overview: A military chef undergoes intense physical, psychological, and emotional testing to join the United Kingdom’s Special Air Service.

Movies.title: Swing Kids
Movies.overview: In a POW camp during the Korean War, a tap-dancing soldier leads his fellow prisoners in a tap show as a distraction from the horrors of their capture.

Movies.title: The Hanoi Hilton
Movies.overview: An affecting and powerful drama about the experiences of POW’s trying to survive a brutal Hanoi prison camp in the midst of the Vietnam War.

Movies.title: Company K
Movies.overview: Troubled veteran Joe Delaney attempts to compile a history of his U.S. Marines company, but nightmares about the soldier he killed still haunt him.

Movies.title: Boys of Abu Ghraib
Movies.overview: From the Producers of Blood Diamond comes a dramatic thriller about a forbidden friendship between an American soldier and an Iraqi detainee during the infamous scandal in the world's most notorious prison: Abu Ghraib.

Movies.title: American Confederate
Movies.overview: War drama about the lives of two cavalries, one Confederate and one a federal Union, during the last three years of the Civil War.

Movies.title: A Terrible Beauty
Movies.overview: A small group of IRA soldiers looks to free Ireland from Great Britain. However, one recruit is unconvinced of the means to do so.

Movies.title: Stalag Luft
Movies.overview: Set in a POW camp deep in Germany, RAF officer James Forrester devises a plan for a mass escape in this sharply observed comedy-drama.

Movies.title: Muay Thai Warrior
Movies.overview: Based on a true figure during the Ayothaya Era, this film depicts the life of Japanese adventurer and Southern Thailand governor Yamada Nagamasa.

Movies.title: The Taking of Tiger Mountain
Movies.overview: A ruthless outlaw bandit with a compound on Tiger Mountain is targeted for a takedown by a resistance captain who sends in an investigator as a mole.

Movies.title: Habermann
Movies.overview: In 1937 Sudetenland, an apolitical saw mill owner, who employs both Germans and Czechs and has a half-Jewish wife, finds his life steamrolled by WW2.

Movies.title: Once a Hero
Movies.overview: A Navy SEAL, loving husband, and father battles the demons of PTSD and addiction while searching for redemption on an extraordinary journey.

Movies.title: Bright Young Things
Movies.overview: A look into the dramatic and cosmopolitan lives of young Londoners who kept the 1930’s tabloids running with their posh lifestyles and wild ways.

Movies.title: The Keeper
Movies.overview: Veteran hikers help a fellow vet overcome PTSD and suicidal thoughts on the Appalachian Trail, honoring 363 fallen comrades. Based on a true story.

Movies.title: Fateless
Movies.overview: A Hungarian teenager’s life during WWII is shattered when he is sent to a concentration camp and must survive hatred as he learns his Jewish heritage.

Movies.title: Hatred
Movies.overview: A young Polish woman’s love for her Ukrainian boyfriend is disrupted by a forced marriage to a rich widower and the horrors to come of World War II.

Movies.title: Karmouz War
Movies.overview: An Egyptian police officer faces off against British forces as they converge on a prison in an attempt to free a soldier guilty of a violent crime.

Movies.title: Firetrail
Movies.overview: As the Union army storms through South Carolina, destroying everything in its path, a troubled Confederate captain is sent to the front lines.

Movies.title: The Mark of Cain
Movies.overview: Testimonies from soldiers who served in Iraq help tell the story of two young men forced into circumstances and actions beyond what they can stand.

Movies.title: The Battle: Roar to Victory
Movies.overview: Set in 1920 Manchuria, a fierce four-day battle pits the rag-tag Korean Chosun Independence Army against the elite firepower of the Japanese military.

Movies.title: Savior
Movies.overview: A hardened and widowed mercenary in the Foreign Legion begins to find his own humanity when confronted with atrocities during the fighting in Bosnia.

Movies.title: Battle of the Brave
Movies.overview: As England and France war for control of Canada in the mid-1800s, a momentous love affair unfolds between a peasant woman and a fur trapper.

Movies.title: Attack on Titan
Movies.overview: Un comando especial es enviado a la luna Titán de Saturno para retomar una operación hidráulica, suspendida por el ataque de unos alienígenas. El líder de la misión también quiere regresar a ese lugar para encontrar a su novia, quien desapareció ahí.

Movies.title: Triple Cross
Movies.overview: During WWII, a rakish convicted bank robber becomes a triple agent working as a spy for both the British and the Germans. Based on a true story.

Movies.title: The Truce
Movies.overview: Based on Primo Levi's autobiographical "The Reawakening".

Movies.title: Haywire
Movies.overview: La tripulación de un tanque blindado va detrás de las líneas enemigas para encontrar el "Tesoro de Hitler," pero descubre algo mucho más siniestro.

Movies.title: AmeriGeddon
Movies.overview: When martial law is declared after a terrorist attack on the national power grid, America’s future lies in the hands of a survivalist militia group.

Movies.title: March or Die
Movies.overview: In the 1920s, a French Foreign Legion unit protects an archaeological dig, until the discovery of a sacred burial site ignites an Arab tribal revolt.

Movies.title: A Bear Named Winnie
Movies.overview: The extraordinary true story of the black bear who would become the inspiration for the stories of A.A. Milne, and the heroic man who saved her life.

Movies.title: Three Kingdoms: Resurrection of the Dragon
Movies.overview: In 228 AD, a time when China was plagued by constant war and divided between three kingdoms, a hero would arise. Zhao Zilong was a common man who rose from humble roots to commander of the army charged with liberating the land from an evil warlord. He ensued numerous battles of strength and wit, but now; he must fight back against the impossible to defy the fate of his nation.

Movies.title: The Huntress of Auschwitz
Movies.overview: A vengeful young American travels to Europe to track down the Nazi guard responsible for the murder of her great-grandparents.

Movies.title: Across the Waters
Movies.overview: Based on true events, Jewish musician Arne Itkin and his family flee Nazi-occupied Denmark in a desperate journey to freedom in neutral Sweden.

Movies.title: The Star
Movies.overview: This World War II tale follows a daring reconnaissance mission to go behind enemy lines and reveal the German army's impending plans.

Movies.title: Battle of Britain: The Race for Radar
Movies.overview: A fascinating historical documentary about the Battle of Britain and British ingenuity in creating a radar system to foil Germany’s Luftwaffe spies.

Movies.title: The Island on Bird Street
Movies.overview: During WWII, a boy hides in the ruins of the Warsaw Ghetto, after his family is sent to concentration camps, and awaits his father’s promised return.

Movies.title: Hiroshima: Out of the Ashes
Movies.overview: The real-life life annals of survivors, from Japanese soldiers and citizens to American POWs, recount the mayhem and devastation of the nuclear blast.

Movies.title: Check Point
Movies.overview: WWE superstar Goldberg stars in this action thriller about a Marine who tries to stop a terrorist invasion after he reports their plot and is ignored.

Movies.title: Suicide Battalion
Movies.overview: A group of recruits in World Word II take on a lethal mission to destroy an American base to keep classified papers from approaching Japanese forces.

Movies.title: We Go In at Dawn
Movies.overview: A U.S. special forces commander is tasked with a rescue mission behind enemy lines in this WWII espionage thriller that’s based on a true story.

Movies.title: Washington's Armor: The Journey
Movies.overview: The story takes place in Colonial America at a time of political turmoil due to the English and French both warring for American soil. As the American Indians carefully choose sides, George Washington gets an opportunity to prove his military capability and resolve, which strategically places him on this miraculous journey to becoming the first president of the United States of America.

Movies.title: McBain
Movies.overview: An ex-POW and former Vietnam War lieutenant reforms his old team in order to help a dead friend's sister overthrow a ruthless dictator.

Movies.title: Agents Unknown
Movies.overview: An elite Army and CIA intelligence operative reveals the intensely critical war decisions made against Viet Cong infiltration in 1967-era Vietnam.

Movies.title: Sarah's Key
Movies.overview: An American journalist is captivated by a mysterious story involving a little Jewish girl living in France during the height of WWII.

Movies.title: Mohawk
Movies.overview: Set in 1812, when barbaric renegade soldiers torch her camp and murder her kin, a young Mohawk warrior assembles her own army to exact bloody revenge.

Movies.title: The Great War of Archimedes
Movies.overview: Before World War II, the Japanese Navy commissions a powerful war ship, but differences over battle-readiness lead to a possible internal conspiracy.

Movies.title: Naked Among Wolves
Movies.overview: Buchenwald concentration camp, late March, 1945. A three-year-old Jewish boy is smuggled into the camp in a suitcase - the effort to hide him and keep him alive becomes a metaphor for the struggle to preserve their humanity among the inmates. Germany with English subtitles.

Movies.title: Beneath Hill 60
Movies.overview: The extraordinary true story of Oliver Woodward. It's 1916 and Woodward must tear himself from his new young love to go to the mud and carnage of the Western Front. Deep beneath the German lines, Woodward and his secret platoon of Australian tunnelers fight to defend a leaking, labyrinthine tunnel system packed with enough high explosives to change the course of the War.

Movies.title: The Eastern Front
Movies.overview: Near the end of history’s largest-ever military confrontation, surviving Nazi troops face hell on Earth as they retreat from the Russian front.

Movies.title: Balkan Line
Movies.overview: A group of soldiers looks to take control of the Slatina airport in Kosovo, but they must first battle a group of terrorists to succeed.

Movies.title: Hangmen Also Die!
Movies.overview: After assassinating a Nazi leader in occupied Czechoslovakia, a Czech doctor tries to evade the Gestapo in this noir-like espionage thriller.

Movies.title: The Somme
Movies.overview: The Somme was a modern battle of such prehistoric brutality that its horror is hard to comprehend. Never have so many soldiers been killed in one day's fighting: 25,000 dead, most in the first hour. This film is based on letters and diaries of soldiers who witnessed the battle first hand and wrote down what they saw and felt.

Movies.title: Sisters of War
Movies.overview: As WWII rages on, a group of Australian nurses and nuns endure captivity under Japanese forces, facing survival and the struggle for forgiveness.

Movies.title: Hitler's War
Movies.overview: An account of Adolf Hitler's rise to power in Germany and the subsequent downfall of the Nazi Regime.

Movies.title: Sinking of the Lusitania: Terror at Sea
Movies.overview: The sinking of the Lusitania, one of the world's great ocean liners, was a shocking event, which reverberated around the world. It provoked outrage on an unprecedented scale. This single act seemed, in one brutal, unforgettable moment, to change the face of war forever.

Movies.title: The Wild Geese
Movies.overview: Richard Burton, Roger Moore, and Richard Harris are a team of mercenaries who must remove a deposed African president and transport him to prison.

Movies.title: God of War
Movies.overview: In 16th century China, maverick Commander Yu leads a small army against hordes of Japanese pirates who invade the coastline and take over Cengang.

Movies.title: The Knight of Shadows: Between Yin and Yang
Movies.overview: A visual feast of action propels this story of a demon hunter forced to journey through parallel worlds to save local young girls from evil forces.

Movies.title: The Spy
Movies.overview: This film is the story of Sonja Wigert, Scandinavia’s most famous movie star during WWII, who became a double agent for the Swedish secret service.

Movies.title: Thirst
Movies.overview: Inspired by true events. Two best friends enlist in the U S Army to fight in the Persian Gulf War, but the men and their unit are soon captured by Iraqi forces and must work together with other prisoners of war to escape the brutal, unforgiving desert while being hunted by the enemy.

Movies.title: 303 Squadron
Movies.overview: The story of an elite fighter squadron of Polish airmen who defended England against the Nazi Luftwaffe during the Battle of Britain.

Movies.title: A Tale of Two Cities
Movies.overview: Based on Charles Dickens's classic, two men, one an aristocrat and the other a dissolute lawyer, fall for the same woman during the French Revolution.

Movies.title: Fortress of War
Movies.overview: World War II drama based on the heroic defense of Russia’s Brest Fortress in 1941 when Nazi invaders began a 9-day battle against Soviet troops.

Movies.title: The Diary of Anne Frank: A Tale of Two Sisters
Movies.overview: This fascinating film is the story of Anne Frank and her step-sister, Eva Schloss, who survived Auschwitz and read Anne's now famous diary.

Movies.title: Housewife, 49
Movies.overview: A historical drama following Nella, a downtrodden housewife who blossoms after joining the Women's Voluntary Service at the outbreak of World War II.

Movies.title: Genocide
Movies.overview: Genocide is a heartbreaking historical account of the turmoil, violence, and resistance that defined life during the Holocaust.

Movies.title: Spitfire
Movies.overview: Credited with changing the course of history, hear the story of the most famous fighter plane ever made, told by the last-surviving combat veterans.

Movies.title: When the Wind Blows
Movies.overview: The animated tale of an elderly couple thrust in the midst of a nuclear attack. As they build their shelter, they experience the devastations of war.

Movies.title: The Chinese Widow
Movies.overview: As the 1941 attack on Pearl Harbor shocks the world, a U.S. pilot sent on an Allied mission to bomb Japan runs out of fuel and is saved by a widow.

Movies.title: In This Corner of the World
Movies.overview: Set in Hiroshima during World War II, a newly married 18-year-old tries to maintain the will to live as she struggles to keep her family fed.

Movies.title: Coriolanus
Movies.overview: When a Roman general and war hero fails to conquer his ego, he brings on his own exile, then teams with his sworn enemy to destroy the great city.

Movies.title: April 9th
Movies.overview: As a Danish peninsula is under attack from Germany in 1940, Denmark’s bicycle and motorcycle companies are ordered to keep the Nazis at bay.

Movies.title: The Grey Zone
Movies.overview: Based on a remarkable true story, a brave group of Jewish prisoners fight launch the only armed revolt to ever occur inside the walls of Auschwitz.

Movies.title: The Rebels of PT-218
Movies.overview: At the height of WWII, the Atlantic Ocean becomes a deadly battleground, as an American sub fights against the constant bombardment of German forces.

Movies.title: Legionnaire
Movies.overview: After refusing to fix a boxing match, a 1920s boxer attempts to avoid a brutal mob boss by joining the ranks of the Foreign Legion in Morocco.

Movies.title: Surrender - Hell!
Movies.overview: Inspired by the story of how a World War II special forces hero became an ad hoc Filipino guerrilla army leader in the fight against the Japanese.

Movies.title: Death in the Bunker: The True Story of Hitler's Downfall
Movies.overview: A look at the final ten days of Hitler’s life, as told through interviews with confidants, eyewitnesses, and even his personal secretary.

Movies.title: SGT. Will Gardner
Movies.overview: A troubled Iraq War veteran struggling to reintegrate into society embarks on a cross-country journey with the hope of reuniting with his young son.

Movies.title: Breakthrough
Movies.overview: A young resistance fighter attempts the impossible rescue of 500 freedom fighters, surrounded by Nazis, high in the mountains, during a harsh winter.

Movies.title: Т-34
Movies.overview: A young Soviet lieutenant tasked with leading a defensive maneuver against the 1944 Nazi invasion has just one beat up T-34 tank at his disposal.

Movies.title: Shadow
Movies.overview: Un comandante se enfrenta a peligros dentro y fuera de los muros del palacio. Pero tiene un arma secreta: una sombra que puede engañar a sus enemigos.

Movies.title: I Am Nero
Movies.overview: Born and raised in Los Angeles but deported to Mexico, Niro is forced to become a "green card soldier" in the U.S. army as a shortcut to citizenship.

Movies.title: Ernest in the Army
Movies.overview: Ernest joins the Army reserves so he can drive the big rigs, but ends up being sent into combat!

Movies.title: William Kelly's War
Movies.overview: As the Great War begins, three male family members sign on and are shipped out to serve in Europe, only to have to fight outlaws when they come home.

Movies.title: Jacknife
Movies.overview: A Vietnam veteran must come to terms with his past when his sister begins dating a former military buddy who reminds him of the war.

Movies.title: All Quiet on the Western Front
Movies.overview: A young, indoctrinated German soldier eagerly enlists to fight in WWI, but the horrors of battle lead him to disillusionment a fight for his soul.

Movies.title: The Scarlet and the Black
Movies.overview: The true story of a Vatican official depicts his bravery, as he defies a Nazi colonel by hiding downed WW2 pilots and escaped POWs in occupied Rome.

Movies.title: Betrayal
Movies.overview: During the final months of World War II, a Nazi officer stationed in the Netherlands risks his life to protect a Jewish family hiding in a farmhouse.

Movies.title: Operation Seawolf
Movies.overview: In the final days of the war, a German captain leads a submarine assault against the United States in a last-ditch effort to defeat the Allies.

Movies.title: Panfilov's 28 Men
Movies.overview: Basado en una historia real, un escuadrón de soldados soviéticos intenta detener una columna de cincuenta y cuatro tanques de la Alemania nazi.

Movies.title: Submarine Seahawk
Movies.overview: An Allied officer, ordered to locate a fleet of Japanese war ships, becomes the target of his crew’s resentment, as he avoids taking on the enemy.

Movies.title: 1914: The Western Front
Movies.overview: Experience the horrors of trench warfare through the eyes of a young Dutch soldier as he volunteers to fight the German army in the First World War.

Movies.title: The Patrol
Movies.overview: A special forces unit prepares for the worst while they come under attack from a ruthless enemy, as they slowly run out of ammunition.

Movies.title: Dauntless: The Battle of Midway
Movies.overview: In 1942, as the Japanese sweep across the Pacific, the two-man crew of a US Navy dive bomber is forced to ditch in the sea during a pivotal battle.

Movies.title: Haven
Movies.overview: A U.S. official escorts Holocaust refugees from 1940s war-torn Europe to temporary shelter in America.

Movies.title: The Great War
Movies.overview: In the twilight of a major conflict, a captain and his squad go behind enemy lines to rescue their lost companions: the all-Black ‘Buffalo Soldiers.’

Movies.title: Battle for Saipan
Movies.overview: When Japanese forces overrun a US Army hospital on the island of Saipan, a medic puts it all on the line to lead a band of wounded soldiers to safety.

Movies.title: The Falklands Play
Movies.overview: Tense drama about the war room strategy led by UK Prime Minister Margaret Thatcher in 1982 as Britain and Argentina went to war for 10 weeks.

Movies.title: Friends for Life
Movies.overview: A retired attorney, whose wife’s death left his family shattered, raises four orphaned wolf pups to adulthood - who later pay him back warmly.

Movies.title: Cyborgs
Movies.overview: Based on a true story, volunteer military soldiers become fierce heroes after they defend an airport under attack in the Ukraine by Russian troops.

Movies.title: Sniper: Special Ops
Movies.overview: A U.S. Army sniper and his partner try to rescue a congressman abducted by the Taliban. But when the mission fails, they are left behind enemy lines.

Movies.title: Journey's End
Movies.overview: Old classmates cross paths once again as grown men during World War I. With German soldiers approaching, they support one another on the battlefield.

Movies.title: M.I.A. A Greater Evil
Movies.overview: A detour leaves a group of American college kids on a hunt for gold in the ravaged jungles of Vietnam to face the echoes of their country’s war.

Movies.title: Citizen Soldier
Movies.overview: Citizen Soldier is a modern day Band of Brothers. Using real footage, the film offers a first-hand look into combat, where the soldiers demonstrate extraordinary bravery and valor to honor a warrior code, never leave a fallen comrade behind.

Movies.title: Gringo
Movies.overview: A United States businessman finds himself at the mercy of local drug lords and a mercenary after travelling to Mexico. He crosses the line from law-abiding citizen to criminal as he fights to survive an increasingly dangerous situation.

Movies.title: No Safe Spaces

Movies.title: All the Queen's Horses

In 2012 after a close colleague turned whistle-blower finally uncovered her scheme and alerted the Mayor, the FBI arrested Crundwell as the largest municipal fraud perpetrator in American history. ALL THE QUEEN’S HORSES is the riveting story of how a pillar of the community could so callously execute a scam of such magnitude. The film reveals the procedures behind how she did it and got away with it for so long, how she was caught, how the city is attempting to rebuild and recover, and how if it happened in Dixon, it could happen anywhere.

Of the 1197 crewmembers; nearly 300 went down with the s...
