Movies.overview: Peter (Charlie Day) and Emma (Jenny Slate) thought they were on the precipice of life’s biggest moments – marriage, kids, and houses in the suburbs – until their respective partners dumped them. Horrified to learn that the loves of their lives have already moved on, Peter and Emma hatch a hilarious plan to win back their exes with unexpected results.

Movies.title: The Song of Lunch
Movies.overview: Alan Rickman and Emma Thompson star in this powerful fusion of poetry and drama. Based on Christopher Reid's narrative poem, The Song of Lunch follows the story of a book editor who, 15 years after their break-up, is meeting his former love for a nostalgic lunch.

Movies.title: National Lampoon Presents Dorm Daze
Movies.overview: The lives of a dozen college students at a co-ed dorm turn upside down with the arrival of two very different women with the same name.

Movies.title: Serving Sara
Movies.overview: A cattle baron’s beautiful wife is blindsided by divorce papers given to her by a hapless process server, so she creates a plan to turn the tables.

Movies.title: All About You
Movies.overview: When a woman falls for her ex-boyfriend’s brother, both are forced to open up and deal with their broken pasts to win a second chance at love.

Movies.title: A Storybook Christmas
Movies.overview: When Celeste hires a nanny to watch over her niece during Christmas, the man who arrives may just be the perfect person for the job—and for her.

Movies.title: Lemonade Stand Romance
Movies.overview: When a little girl's lemonade stand gets shut down over an outdated bylaw, Trish McTavish, an ambitious young PR rep with the nation's largest lemonade chain, is tasked to return to her hometown to fight the ban.

Movies.title: Hometown Remedy
Movies.overview: Una cirujana regresa a casa para celebrar que su padre se convierta en alcalde y conoce al único médico de la ciudad que es el soltero más elegible.

Movies.title: Good
Movies.overview: A professor faces an ethical crisis when his book about compassionate euthanasia is adopted as practice by the German government in the 1930s.

Movies.title: According to Greta
Movies.overview: After she is sent to live with her grandparents for the summer, a bright and beautiful but suicidal teen's life takes an unexpected turn.

Movies.title: Emma
Movies.overview: In this adaptation of the classic novel, a beautiful woman is happy to play matchmaker, but fails to notice that her own heart has been captured.

Movies.title: Lying Eyes
Movies.overview: A popular high school cheerleader is romanced by a rich older man. When she learns he’s married and tries to leave him, he vows to kill her.

Movies.title: Runaway Romance
Movies.overview: A reality -TV star leaves Hollywood and finds herself in Amish country where she must decide between her newfound reality or returning to fame.

Movies.title: Emerson Heights
Movies.overview: An actor in L.A. tries to beat the long-distance relationship curse with his New York girlfriend, especially after he lands a blockbuster movie role.

Movies.title: A Prince in Paradise
Movies.overview: A pop fiction writer takes a post-breakup vacation where she runs into one of her fans and starts to fall for him—only to find out that he’s a Prince.

Movies.title: Life Itself
Movies.overview: As a young New York City couple goes from college romance to marriage and the birth of their first child, the unexpected twists of their journey create reverberations that echo over continents and through lifetimes.

Movies.title: Dripping in Chocolate
Movies.overview: Detective Bennett O'Mara investigates a chocolate wrapper left at the scene of a strangulation case. The clue leads him to enigmatic chocolatier Juliana Lovece.

Movies.title: The Swing of Things
Movies.overview: In this raunchy laugh riot starring Luke Wilson and Olivia Culpo, an innocent young couple and their wedding party accidentally wind up at a hedonistic swingers' resort in Jamaica.

Movies.title: The Soulmate Search
Movies.overview: When a famously exclusive dating service with a supposed 100% match rate fails spectacularly for Elen and Will, they team up to get their money back.

Movies.title: Midnight Sun
Movies.overview: A sheltered teenage girl who suffers from a severe sensitivity to sunlight has her world open up during nighttime guitar sessions with her crush.

Movies.title: Valentine's Town
Movies.overview: Jude returns to his hometown to build a tacky, love-themed resort. Standing in his way is a local business owner—and his own childhood sweetheart.

Movies.title: The Aeronauts
Movies.overview: In 1862, daredevil balloon pilot Amelia Wren (Felicity Jones) teams up with pioneering meteorologist James Glaisher (Eddie Redmayne) to advance human knowledge of the weather and fly higher than anyone in history.

Movies.title: The Little Hours
Movies.overview: In the Middle Ages, a handsome young servant fleeing from his enslaver takes refuge at a convent full of emotionally unstable nuns.

Movies.title: The PA and the Manhattan Prince
Movies.overview: A personal assistant to the stars finds her heart entering precarious territory when her new royal employer arrives in New York for a masquerade ball.

Movies.title: A Little Bit of Heaven
Movies.overview: An irreverent young woman, who shields her heart with humor, has a life-altering visit with her doctor, who takes her on an eye-opening adventure.

Movies.title: Puppy Love
Movies.overview: After a disastrous first date, wild-child Nicole and socially-anxious Max vow to lose each other’s numbers until they learn that their dogs found a love match, and now puppies are on the way! The hilariously mismatched Nicole and Max are forced to become responsible co-parents, but may end up finding love themselves. Starring Lucy Hale and Grant Gustin.

Movies.title: Finding Love in San Antonio
Movies.overview: After an interview goes wrong, a chef must restore her reputation with the help of an unlikely partner, the food writer who conducted the interview.

Movies.title: Miss Potter
Movies.overview: The story of Beatrix Potter, the author of the beloved and best-selling children's book, "The Tale of Peter Rabbit", and her struggle for love, happiness and success.

Movies.title: The Late Bloomer
Movies.overview: The story of an adult male who, after the successful removal of a benign tumor, experiences all the changes and effects of puberty over a three-week period. Starring Johnny Simmons and Brittany Snow.

Movies.title: Identical Love
Movies.overview: When a doctor volunteers abroad, she  discovers that her ex-fiancé’s cute twin is also there. Can she love him for himself and not see him as her ex?

Movies.title: Christmas at the Chateau
Movies.overview: How will three sisters save the Shakespeare Chateau, a historic mansion and beloved family home, from the threat of foreclosure on Christmas Day?

Movies.title: Rekindling Christmas
Movies.overview: A former NFL football player hopes to win back his college sweetheart when he becomes the head coach at their alma mater.

Movies.title: Somebody I Used to Know
Movies.overview: Ally becomes convinced that she has to right her past mistakes and win her ex back… which gets much more complicated when she meets his new fiancée.

Movies.title: Sylvie's Love
Movies.overview: When a young woman meets an aspiring saxophonist in her father’s record shop in 1950s Harlem, their love ignites a sweeping romance that transcends changing times, geography, and professional success.

Movies.title: Finding Love in Big Sky, Montana
Movies.overview: Una ranchera independiente asume la tarea de mantener el rancho de su abuelo y se reencuentra con su exnovio, quien la ayuda a administrar el rancho.

Movies.title: The Engagement Ring
Movies.overview: Now in their golden years, former childhood sweethearts still feud over a lost engagement ring, impeding new love between her daughter and his nephew.

Movies.title: A Wedding to Remember
Movies.overview: On opposite sides of a development project, Olivia and Brian are surprised to find they are the Maid of Honor and Best Man at the same wedding. They have to put their feelings aside to save their best friends' wedding... which may turn out to be their own as well!

Movies.title: Looking for Dr. Love
Movies.overview: A recently divorced hairstylist on a mission to reconnect with her college sweetheart is shocked to learn he’s the DJ she listens to on the radio.

Movies.title: Something from Tiffany's
Movies.overview: Life – like love – is full of surprises and unexpected gifts. In the holiday romance Something From Tiffany’s, one woman’s life is forever changed by an engagement ring meant for someone else.

Movies.title: Night of the Living Deb
Movies.overview: The morning after a drunken hookup on July 4, two strangers become instant partners in survival against the zombie virus that has consumed their town.

Movies.title: Sister Dating Swap
Movies.overview: When sisters Helena and Rachel are fed up with their love and work life, they agree to swap homes for 2 weeks. Yet what starts out as a holiday grows into a whole new perspective on their careers, life and most importantly, romance.

Movies.title: Suite Française
Movies.overview: France, 1940: During the Nazi occupation, a young Frenchwoman begins a romance with a refined German officer while awaiting news of her POW husband.

Movies.title: Lilly Lives Alone
Movies.overview: Ten years after her daughter's tragic death, Lilly's world is tearing apart. The traumatic ghosts of her past are waking up and tonight she must face the depths of her manic madness and a haunting she won't soon forget.

Movies.title: Timeless Love
Movies.overview: Everyone in Megan's life thinks she's gone crazy after awakening from a coma and insisting she's married until her dream husband suddenly appears.

Movies.title: Boardwalk Winter
Movies.overview: Optimist Fern, with an unexpected expiration date, hunts for a husband at a beachside hotel. But when flirting at the gym and long walks on the beach with strangers fails, could a surfer with a badge be the love she's racing to find?

Movies.title: Faith, Hope & Love
Movies.overview: Faith, una mujer divorciada, participa en un concurso de baile para salvar su estudio de danza, donde conoce a Jimmy y redescubre su fe y sus sueños.

Movies.title: Love at the Ranch
Movies.overview: Allison Sawyer is the go-to reporter at Metropolis Post. Her next story is a piece on author Annabelle Lee - Annabelle based all her romantic novels on the timelessly beautiful Clyborne Ranch. Allison heads to the ranch and meets Hank and his Grandma who have been running the place together for years. As Allison gets closer to Annabelle's life, she also becomes a lot closer to Hank.

Movies.title: At the Midnight Hour
Movies.overview: Liz, a beautiful nanny, brings new meaning to the lives of Richard Keaton, a widowed scientist, and his gifted but estranged son Andy. Liz's life is threatened when she gets too close to the truth of who killed the former Mrs. Keaton.

Movies.title: Charade
Movies.overview: Before she can finalize her divorce, Regina Lampert’s husband turns up dead and she soon finds herself pursued in Paris for the fortune he’d stolen.

Movies.title: Buzzard
Movies.overview: Before getting busted for his latest con, a petty crook leaves town for Detroit armed with bogus checks and a very special Nintendo¨ Power Glove.

Movies.title: Attraction
Movies.overview: A spaceship’s catastrophic crash into Moscow sends the population into terrified chaos while an alien offers a young woman a new state of existence.

Movies.title: Give 'em Hell, Malone
Movies.overview: Hired to retrieve a suitcase from a seedy hotel, a private eye walks right into a bloody trap and finds himself at the mercy of an army of thugs.

Movies.title: Beauty and the Billionaire
Movies.overview: To help out her brother, Addison is forced to travel with his picky billionaire boss when they start to see more in each other than they thought.

Movies.title: Plus One at an Amish Wedding
Movies.overview: April, una doctora prometedora, acompaña a su novio a una boda para presentarse a la familia y amigos que el dejó atrás hace muchos años.

Movies.title: My Mom's New Boyfriend
Movies.overview: An FBI agent discovers more than he wanted to about his mom when he is ordered to spy on her new boyfriend, a suspect in an art theft investigation.

Movies.title: Our Dream Wedding
Movies.overview: A commitment-shy woman reconsiders her thoughts on love when trying on her grandma's magical wedding veil transports her to a happily married future.

Movies.title: The Railway Man
Movies.overview: A former WW2 army officer embarks on a mission of revenge, to confront the man who tormented him while he was a prisoner at a Japanese labor camp.

Movies.title: Out of the Wild
Movies.overview: A down and out cowboy finds work training a troubled mustang, a horse whose past and temperament mirror his own. Based on the novel by Mark Rashid.

Movies.title: Mayor Cupcake
Movies.overview: A hard-working cupcake maker is inadvertently elected mayor of a small town burdened with debt. Uneducated, she relies on her street smarts to clean up the town.

Movies.title: Love in Aruba
Movies.overview: At the end of a school year, a teacher meets a single dad searching for a tutor and nanny for his daughter and in need of help to bring them closer.

Movies.title: Rebel in the Rye
Movies.overview: Nicholas Hoult stars in the tale of the literary genius behind the masterpiece Catcher in the Rye and the mentor who helped change American culture forever.

Movies.title: The Map of Tiny Perfect Things
Movies.overview: Quick-witted teen Mark (Kyle Allen) is contentedly living the same day in an endless loop when his world is turned upside-down by the mysterious Margaret (Kathryn Newton), also stuck in the same loop. What follows is a love story with a fantastical twist, as the two struggle to figure out how – and whether – to escape their never-ending day.

Movies.title: From Prada to Nada
Movies.overview: After their father passes away, two privileged Beverly Hills young women are forced to move in with their estranged aunt in East Los Angeles.

Movies.title: Fort Bliss
Movies.overview: A decorated US Army medic and single mom struggles to rebuild her relationship with her young son when she returns from duty in Afghanistan.

Movies.title: After Midnight
Movies.overview: Hank's sanity starts to crack when his girlfriend disappears, leaving a cryptic note as her only explanation. Then a monster descends on his home.

Movies.title: She's Lost Control
Movies.overview: The boundaries of professional intimacy blur for a sexual surrogate whose personal life starts unraveling when she takes on a new client.

Movies.title: One Night with the King
Movies.overview: The sweeping Biblical story of the woman who would become Esther and save the Jewish nation from oblivion, comes alive in this epic drama.

Movies.title: The Prince & Me 4: The Elephant Adventure
Movies.overview: Un rey y una reina deben buscar a un elefante desaparecido y reunir a una princesa, descontenta con su matrimonio arreglado, con su verdadero amor.

Movies.title: An Hour Behind
Movies.overview: When an entrepreneur with a thriving bakery runs late, she mistakes a kind paramedic for her blind date, but resists love’s unexpected sweet treat.

Movies.title: Animal Kingdom
Movies.overview: Joshua “J” is taken in by his extended family after his mother dies. The family is heavily involved in criminal activities, and J is soon indoctrinated into their way of life. But J is given a chance to take another path when a cop seeks to help him.

Movies.title: Shotgun Wedding
Movies.overview: Darcy (Jennifer Lopez) and Tom (Josh Duhamel) gather their families for the ultimate destination wedding but when the entire party is taken hostage, “’Til Death Do Us Part” takes on a whole new meaning in this hilarious, adrenaline-fueled adventure as Darcy and Tom must save their loved ones—if they don’t kill each other first.

Movies.title: Love in Full Swing
Movies.overview: Becks, an aspiring romance columnist, decides to help her best friend Casey in search of his first love. But unforeseen complications ensue.

Movies.title: Die Alone
Movies.overview: An amnesiac bands together with a loner survivalist as he sifts through fragmented memories to find his lost girlfriend amid a zombie apocalypse.

Movies.title: Lost in Love
Movies.overview: Two tourists get left behind during a bus tour in Turkey. Without any of their belongings, the strangers must join forces to get back to Istanbul.

Movies.title: My Best Friend's Wedding Planner
Movies.overview: A wedding planner's childhood friend decides to hire her to plan his wedding, and the pair get closer as the future bride is distracted by her work.

Movies.title: A Thousand Miles Behind
Movies.overview: A grieving man sets out on a solo trip across California after a motorcycle mysteriously turns up on his doorstep, but will the lonely road ultimately help him leave the past behind?

Movies.title: Jackie & Ryan
Movies.overview: After a chance encounter, a guitar-strumming train hopper and a single mom battling for custody of her daughter embark on an unlikely romance.

Movies.title: Daniel's Daughter
Movies.overview: When a woman learns that her father has passed away, she must confront the past and town she left behind.

Movies.title: Persuasion
Movies.overview: Eight years after her then-wealthy parents rejected Anne’s one true love, he returns from the war a Royal Navy captain with the upper hand.

Movies.title: A Country Romance
Movies.overview: When Sarah Kress learns her family's vineyard is up for sale, she leaves her busy urban life and visits her hometown to help with the sale and have her last harvest. With the help of handsome neighbour Gabe, huge challenge becomes fun as she and Gabe fall in love. But when the job is done, Sarah must decide whether to return to her fast-paced life or follow her heart.

Movies.title: After We Collided
Movies.overview: In her complicated relationship with Hardin, Tessa confronts a single, difficult choice that holds the power to irrevocably change both their lives.

Movies.title: Love's Second Chance
Movies.overview: When Rose inherits her grandmother's vintage dress shop, she runs into her high school crush, Cole, who convinces her to restore the store.

Movies.title: The Lost Husband
Movies.overview: After the sudden death of her husband, a woman tries to pick up the pieces of her life by moving with her kids to her aunt’s goat farm.

Movies.title: The Neighbor
Movies.overview: A middle-aged man in a stagnant marriage finds his life upended when an attractive young woman and her seemingly abusive husband move in next door.

Movies.title: A Walk to Remember
Movies.overview: North Carolina teens Landon Carter and Jamie Sullivan are thrown together after one gets into trouble and is sentenced to community service.

Movies.title: Romance on the Ranch
Movies.overview: Sara es invitada a un rancho familiar cuando su camioneta se avería. Allí conoce a dos hermanos y empieza a sentir algo por ambos.

Movies.title: Half Magic
Movies.overview: A meeting at a female empowerment event turns three jilted strangers into fast friends who co-navigate their sexist realities in Los Angeles.

Movies.title: Home Again
Movies.overview: Alice, a newly separated mother, finds her life upended when three charismatic young men move into her guest house. Her new family and budding romance come to a crashing halt when her ex-husband shows up, suitcase in hand.

Movies.title: Fatale
Movies.overview: Feeling remorseful after a one-night stand, a married sports agent finds himself embroiled in a deadly game of cat-and-mouse with his devious lover.

Movies.title: Sex Drive
Movies.overview: A teenager desperate to lose his virginity persuades his friends to go on a road trip with him to meet a girl he met online, but the trip soon turns out to be a series of hilarious mishaps.

Movies.title: Red, White & Royal Blue
Movies.overview: Based on the New York Times bestseller, Red, White & Royal Blue centers around Alex, the president’s son, and Britain’s Prince Henry whose long-running feud threatens to drive a wedge in U.S./British relations. When the rivals are forced into a staged truce, their icy relationship begins to thaw and the friction between them sparks something deeper than they ever expected.

Movies.title: I Don't Know How She Does It
Movies.overview: A career-driven mom tries to keep her head above water juggling work and family while enduring bake sales, head lice, and many unsolicited opinions.

Movies.title: Coming 2 America
Movies.overview: Akeem and Semmi are back! Set in the lush and royal country of Zamunda, newly-crowned King Akeem (Eddie Murphy) and his trusted confidante Semmi (Arsenio Hall) embark on an all-new hilarious adventure that has them traversing the globe from their great African nation to the borough of Queens, New York – where it all began.

Movies.title: Palm Trees and Power Lines
Movies.overview: A disconnected teenage girl with a lonely home life falls into a relationship with a man she meets at a diner who is twice her age.

Movies.title: Love's Portrait
Movies.overview: After a painting of a woman who looks just like her is anonymously donated to her museum, a widowed young curator goes to Ireland to find the artist.

Movies.title: Strange but True
Movies.overview: Five years after their son’s death, a family is swept into a dark mystery when his old girlfriend appears to tell them she’s pregnant with his baby.

Movies.title: Tom Clancy's Without Remorse
Movies.overview: Seeking justice for the murder of his pregnant wife, an elite Navy SEAL uncovers a covert plot that threatens to engulf the United States and Russia in an all-out war.

Movies.title: Hide
Movies.overview: In this movie based on Lisa Gardner's book, Carla Gugino plays Boston Police Detective D.D. Warren, who is called to the grounds of an abandoned mental hospital where a buried chamber is discovered.

Movies.title: Saltburn
Movies.overview: Academy Award winning filmmaker Emerald Fennell brings us a beautifully wicked tale of privilege and desire. Struggling to find his place at Oxford University, student Oliver Quick (Barry Keoghan) finds himself drawn into the world of the charming and aristocratic Felix Catton (Jacob Elordi), who invites him to Saltburn, his eccentric family’s sprawling estate, for a summer never to be forgotten.

Movies.title: Transfusion
Movies.overview: To save his son, an ex-special forces operative embarks on a final mission deep within the criminal underworld, facing a relentless quest.

Movies.title: Tracers
Movies.overview: Hoping to get out of debt to an organized crime gang, a bicycle messenger joins a group that uses parkour to pull of dangerous heists.

Movies.title: Why Did I Get Married Too?
Movies.overview: Reuniting the same charismatic cast from his hit comedy/drama, Why did I get married?, Tyler Perry brings us the next chapter in the lives of eight college friends struggling with the challenges of marital life in Why did I get married too?

Movies.title: One for the Money
Movies.overview: Unemployed and newly-divorced Stephanie Plum lands a job at her cousin's bail-bond business, where her first assignment puts her on the trail of a wanted local cop from her romantic past.

Movies.title: Longing
Movies.overview: An American bachelor (Richard Gere) learns that a former girlfriend gave birth to his son 20 years ago and the boy has recently died in a car accident.

Movies.title: Cleanskin
Movies.overview: An MI6 agent working deep undercover in London’s criminal underbelly rushes to neutralize a terrorist cell that has stolen a cache of explosives.

Movies.title: Black '47
Movies.overview: One soldier's ruthless pursuit of justice plays out against the darkest chapter of Irish history in this riveting revenge thriller. Starring Hugo Weaving and Jim Broadbent.

Movies.title: Waiting...
Movies.overview: Ryan Reynolds, Anna Ferris, and Justin Long serve up the laughs as young waiters and waitresses searching for the meaning of life, love, and friendship in this outrageous comedy.

Movies.title: Wild Card
Movies.overview: Wild Card tells the story of a tough compulsive gambler who makes his living providing protection in the rough edges of the gambling world as a “chaperone.” His day job takes a backseat when his friend is brutally beaten by a high-rolling mobster prince.

Movies.title: The Cabin in the Woods
Movies.overview: Five college friends in a remote cabin are attacked by supernatural creatures and manipulated by technicians monitoring their every move.

Movies.title: Lap Dance
Movies.overview: An aspiring actress makes a pact with her fiancé to start stripping to foot her dad’s cancer bills but learns that fast money comes with a price.

Movies.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay - Part 2
Movies.overview: Katniss realises the stakes are no longer just for survival - they are for the future. With the nation of Panem in a full scale war, Katniss confronts President Snow in the final showdown.

Movies.title: My Weird School
Movies.overview: Based on the 35 million best-selling book series by Dan Gutman, AJ and his best friends alongside team up with unlikely allies and unite to save their school from an alien invasion.

Movies.title: A Useful Ghost
Movies.overview: March is mourning his wife Nat, who has recently passed away due to dust pollution. He discovers her spirit has returned by possessing a vacuum cleaner. Disturbed by a ghost that appeared after a worker's death shut down their factory, his family rejects their unconventional human-ghost relationship. Trying to convince them of their love, Nat offers to cleanse the factory.

Movies.title: Fran the Man
Movies.overview: Competing in the FAI Cup for the first time should have been St Peter's Celtic's finest hour, but when blundering assistant manager Fran Costello learns that some of his players have taken bribes to fix the match, he turns detective in the hope of catching the rats.

Movies.title: Psychonaut
Movies.overview: Using an experimental machine that enters memories, a woman dives into her dying girlfriend's mind to find one healing moment. Inside the shifting subconscious, a figure believed dead hunts them as time runs out.

Movies.title: Predators
Movies.overview: A chilling, surprising exploration of "To Catch a Predator," the televisions series which hunted down sex offenders, and the world it helped create.

Movies.title: Bank of Dave 2: The Loan Ranger
Movies.overview: Two years after founding his own bank, local hero Dave Fishwick takes on the predatory payday lenders bringing misery to his small English town.

Movies.title: Honey Bunch
Movies.overview: Diana's recovery unravels dark truths about her marriage.

Movies.title: Saipan
Movies.overview: On the eve of the 2002 FIFA World Cup, the Irish captain Roy Keane forfeits his place in the squad at the team's preparation base in Saipan, following a heated disagreement with the Irish manager Mick McCarthy (Steve Coogan).

Movies.title: Islands
Movies.overview: Between drinking sessions and one-night stands, washed-up tennis pro Tom (Sam Riley) clings to a job coaching holidaymakers at a hotel in Fuerteventura. When an English couple (Stacy Martin and Jack Farthing) arrive, their presence sets off a chain of events that leads to a mysterious disappearance.

Movies.title: Kill Ratio
Movies.overview: An attack on a new Eastern European president puts an American covert operative against a ruthless military leader aiming to seize control.

Movies.title: Before Homosexuals
Movies.overview: Filmmaker John Scagliotti offers a tour of erotic history, poetry, and visual art in this point-of-view documentary detailing same-sex desire from ancient times to present day.

Movies.title: Playdate
Movies.overview: When newly minted mom Amy enters the cutthroat world of preschool, she finds what she believes is a welcome ally in new next-door neighbor Grace.

Movies.title: Pharaoh
Movies.overview: After the death of his father, the youthful Ramses XIII becomes ruler of Egypt. But his reign quickly comes into conflict with the powerful priesthood, who control the empire's vast treasury and seek to undermine his ambitions. As Ramses defiantly assumes control of the army, the country becomes locked in a bitter struggle between those loyal to the new ruler and those clinging to the old guard.

Movies.title: From Zero to I Love You
Movies.overview: A chance meeting between a gay man with intimacy issues and a closeted husband will force each to confront what he wants out of his romantic life.

Movies.title: Americano
Movies.overview: Following the death of his mother, Martin (Mathieu Demy) travels to California to settle her estate. When the heartfelt recollections of family friend Linda (Geraldine Chaplin) challenge his own negative memories of his mother, Martin finds himself searching for the truth behind not only her forgotten past, but also his own. An old photograph of his mother with a pretty Mexican girl sets off Martin’s journey south of the border in a red Mustang, determined to find the woman who may unravel the mystery behind his mother’s enigmatic life. Ending up in a dingy Tijuana sex club, Martin meets a broken down stripper named Lola (Salma Hayek), who holds the secret of Martin’s past - and the key to his future. From writer/director Demy comes a heartbreaking tale of lost family, found memories, and owning up to the choices that ultimately define a life.

Movies.title: Lace Crater
Movies.overview: Ruth, a lonely young woman staying at a haunted house, has sex with Michael, a burlap-draped ghost. But their night together has a high cost.

Movies.title: Butterfly Girl
Movies.overview: In this moving celebration of a life well-lived, Abbie Evans shares an intimate look into her day-to-day experiences as a teenager coping with a rare and lethal skin disease. Like any other 18-year-old, Abbie must balance her desire for independence against her parents' protective nature, which is compounded by her disease. BUTTERFLY GIRL follows Abbie's journey as she comes of age while overcoming exceptional circumstances.

Movies.title: 666: The Beast
Movies.overview: A Horrifying Supernatural Thriller of Faith in the tradition of The Omen and The Devil's Advocate.

Movies.title: Rain
Movies.overview: When the passengers of a ship get stranded on a Samoan island, a self-righteous missionary resolves to save the soul of a spirited sex worker.

Movies.title: Imagraphy
Movies.overview: Enter the minds of 16 international masters of photography, who share stories about their most iconic images, technique, and impressions of our world.

Movies.title: Song of Granite
Movies.overview: With elements of fiction and documentary, Pat Collins celebrates the art of Sean-nós singing through an atypical, poetic portrait of traditional Irish folk singer Joe Heaney. Told in fragments and sumptuous B&W cinematography, this work of stirring beauty is an ode to the sublime power of singing.

Movies.title: The Great Indian Kitchen
Movies.overview: Like any Indian girl, the bride of the 'The Great Indian Kitchen' moves into her husband's house prepared to adapt to their customs and make it her home. Her husband and his parents do love and care for her. But problems arise when her kind mother-in-law has to be away. She struggles to cope with the mountain of seemingly endless household chores, differences in opinion and unfamiliar traditions.

Movies.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay - Part 1
Movies.overview: Katniss finds herself in District 13 after she shatters the games forever. Under the leadership of President Coin and the advice of her trusted friends, Katniss spreads her wings as she fights to save Peeta and a nation moved by her courage.

Movies.title: Aleta: Vampire Mistress
Movies.overview: An FBI agent is sent to track down a woman who kills two robbers, despite sustaining multiple gunshots, only to find she’s an evil, lusty vampire.

Movies.title: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire
Movies.overview: Katniss and Peeta's victory sparks a rebellion in the Districts of Panem. But the Capitol is still very much in control as President Snow prepares the 75th Hunger Games ("The Quarter Quell") a competition that could change Panem forever.

Movies.title: The Hunger Games
Movies.overview: Based on the bestselling dystopian book series. Katniss Everdeen (Jennifer Lawrence) voluntarily takes her younger sister's place in The Hunger Games: a televised competition in which teenagers are chosen at random to fight to the death.

Movies.title: Nelly Knows Mysteries: All Manners of Murder
Hats Off to Love
Movies.overview: As she prepares for a prestigious contest, a talented hatmaker forms an unexpected bond with a kind horse trainer, who helps her navigate derby decorum.

Movies.title: Sound of Falling
Movies.overview: Four adolescent girls (Alma, Erika, Angelika, Lenka) each spend their youth in the same farmhouse over the last century. Though separated by decades, resonances between their lives emerge: their desires and distress, secrets and truths, encounters with another's gaze and defiant gaze in return.

Movies.title: LUPIN THE IIIRD: The Movie - The Immortal Bloodline
Nirvanna the Band the Show the Movie
Pillion
Movies.overview: Wallflower Colin (Harry Melling) leads a humdrum existence until he meets the impossibly handsome Ray (Alexander Skarsgård), a mysterious biker he is soon desperately devoted to. Hilarious, subversive and sexy, PILLION is the acclaimed and tender love story from writer-director Harry Lighton, starring Melling and Skarsgård in fearless performances as a mild young man and his leather-clad lover.

Movies.title: Redux Redux
Movies.overview: Irene travels through parallel universes, avenging her daughter's death in each one.

Movies.title: "Wuthering Heights"
Movies.overview: A bold and original imagining of one of the greatest love stories of all time, Emerald Fennell's WUTHERING HEIGHTS stars Margot Robbie as Cathy and Jacob Elordi as Heathcliff, whose forbidden passion for one another turns from romantic to intoxicating in an epic tale of lust, love and madness.

Movies.title: GOAT
Movies.overview: A goat with big dreams gets a once-in-a-lifetime shot to play roarball and revolutionize the sport.

Movies.title: Scream 7
Movies.overview: Ghostface returns with a vengeance - and this time it's personal. Sidney Prescott (Neve Campbell) has built a quiet life with her family, far from the horrors that once defined her. But when Sidney's daughter (Isabel May) becomes his next target, her worst fears become reality. Forced to face the nightmare she thought was buried, Sidney launches a relentless fight to protect her family.

Movies.title: Nate Bargatze: Hello World
Movies.overview: Grammy nominated comedian Nate Bargatze delivers his family friendly take on a variety of topics including disadvantages of being the first born, the challenges of playing golf with your wife, and what happens when a bald eagle touches your head.

Movies.title: The Life After Death Project 2: Personal Encounters
Movies.overview: A wide array of people, including doctors and nurses who have witnessed spirit-related phenomena, share their personal encounters with the afterlife.

Movies.title: A Fool and His Money
Movies.overview: While watching TV, ex-adman Morris Codman receives a message from God. Advised by the Almighty to go into business for himself, Codman inaugurates his own religion, founded on a philosophy of selfishness.

Movies.title: The Adventures of the Wilderness Family
Movies.overview: The story of a modern, 1970’s family that grew weary of the hassles of city life in Los Angeles and moved to the Rocky Mountains—never to return.

Movies.title: Penelope
Movies.overview: An aristocratic heiress just wants to find love, but one small flaw keeps getting in the way. Why does a pig's nose have to make things complicated?

Movies.title: LOL
Movies.overview: Anne (Demi Moore) deals with life as a working mother and raising her teen, Lola, (Miley Cyrus) who seems to be growing up faster than expected.

Movies.title: Cougars, Inc.
Movies.overview: A slacker student comes up with a brilliant scheme to afford school: start an escort service that has older women paying for his tuition.

Movies.title: Alpha and Omega
Movies.overview: HD. A pair of polar-opposite wolves must work out their differences while trying to find their way home.

Movies.title: Two Night Stand
Movies.overview: Two twentysomethings in the city have a one-night stand after hooking up online, but a snowstorm forces them to stay together past the following day.

Movies.title: Tears in the Rain
Movies.overview: An American woman fulfills her late mother’s wish to pass on a letter to an English Lord, and finds herself enchanted with his son.

Movies.title: Hombre
Movies.overview: A white man raised by Apaches faces numerous challenges from bigoted passengers when outlaws ambush their stagecoach in this taut western drama.

Movies.title: Violent City
Movies.overview: A professional hit-man sets out to take revenge on the woman and the mob boss who used his mistress to set up a murder plot against him.

Movies.title: Requiem for a Dream
Movies.overview: The lives of four people intertwine in this gut-wrenching, hypnotic tale of addiction and the devastation it has on their lives and those around them.

Movies.title: The Banquet
Movies.overview: A Chinese empress hatches a plan of her own after her murderous husband banishes her stepbrother, whom she desires.

Movies.title: The Weapon
Movies.overview: Dallas is a one-man killing machine who is working for a Vegas mob boss and won't stop until justice is served.

Movies.title: Wishmaster 2: Evil Never Dies
Movies.overview: During a botched art heist, Morgana unwittingly frees the Djinn from his gem prison who she now must stop with help from her ex lover-turned priest.

Movies.title: Evil Dead II
Movies.overview: Cabin visitors fight spirits of the dead with a chainsaw, a shotgun and Egyptian incantations.

Movies.title: Children of the Corn
Movies.overview: A young couple find themselves stranded in a rural Nebraska town where they encounter a mysterious religious sect of children and no adults in sight.

Movies.title: Kill the Irishman
Movies.overview: The true story of a tough Irish thug working for mobsters in Cleveland during a turf war in the 1970s.

Movies.title: Dead Man's Hand
Movies.overview: Gunslinger Reno is headed west for a quiet life with his new bride. But when their stagecoach is ambushed, he kills the outlaws in self-defence. Learning that one of the men he slayed was the brother of ruthless mayor Clarence Bishop, Reno turns to Marshal Roy McCutcheon for help…but Bishop will not let his brother’s death go unpunished.

Movies.title: Moving On
Movies.overview: Jane Fonda and Lily Tomlin star as estranged friends who reunite to seek revenge on the petulant widower (Malcolm McDowell) of their recently deceased best friend. Along the way, Fonda's character reunites with her great love (Richard Roundtree) as each woman learns to make peace with the past and each other.

Movies.title: The Man Who Came Back
Movies.overview: Framed for murder and left for dead, a local legend comes back to make the guilty pay as he seeks revenge on those who killed his family in this traditional western about one man who stood against injustice.

Movies.title: The Inhabitant
Movies.overview: A series of supernatural events reveals a dark truth behind a tormented teenager.

Movies.title: Michael Jackson: Ungloved
Movies.overview: From modest childhood beginnings to international fame, this is the journey of the forever King of Pop and his complicated world.

Movies.title: The Program
Movies.overview: Convinced that Lance Armstrong used banned performance-enhancing drugs during the tour de France, a sports reporter embarks on a hunt for evidence.

Movies.title: Stranger Than Fiction
Movies.overview: An IRS agent’s entire existence is affected by an internal narration of his life that only he can hear, reshaping his life all the way to his death.

Movies.title: The Forbidden Kingdom
Movies.overview: A mystical staff transports an American teen to China, where he joins a band of martial-arts warriors to free the imprisoned Monkey King.

Movies.title: Shattered
Movies.overview: In this thriller starring Academy Award Nominee John Malkovich (RED) and Frank Grillo (AVENGERS: ENDGAME), a millionaire (Cameron Monaghan) falls for a woman (Lily Krug) he meets by chance-but soon suspects her of dangerous motives.

Movies.title: TURA!
Movies.overview: TURA! tells the shocking true story of Asian American cinema icon Tura Satana, star of Faster, Pussycat! Kill! Kill! Narrated by Margaret Cho, with interviews from John Waters, Dita Von Teese, and more, it's a thrilling, heartfelt look at a burlesque legend and cult film star whose legacy of female empowerment lives on.

Movies.title: Boogeyman
Movies.overview: A young man returns to his old family home to face a childhood fear that abducted his father 15 years ago and has since affected his entire life.

Movies.title: Hannibal Rising
Movies.overview: As in the Thomas Harris novel, the orphaned young Hannibal Lecter begins plotting bloody revenge, after his baby sister is killed during World War II.

Movies.title: Midnight Sex Run
Movies.overview: Two men are given 24 hours to sleep with 10 women. If they don’t, their dads will be killed.

Movies.title: Miss Meadows
Movies.overview: Miss Meadows is just a prim school teacher on the outside, but inside hides the soul of a vigilante, righting wrongs by whatever means necessary.

Movies.title: Brooklyn's Finest
Movies.overview: In the course of one chaotic week, the lives of three conflicted New York City police officers are dramatically transformed by their involvement in a massive drug operation.

Movies.title: Last Night
Movies.overview: Right before a model is about to finally move in with her  long-time boyfriend, she meets an attractive stranger out of the blue and is sidetracked.

Movies.title: Jailbait Babysitter
Movies.overview: A teenage girl finds herself caught between two worlds when she becomes embroiled in a dangerous affair with an older man. As she struggles to navigate the complexities of love and desire, she must confront her own desires and seek redemption.

Movies.title: Solitary Man
Movies.overview: A car magnate watches his personal and professional life hit the skids because of his business and romantic indiscretions.

Movies.title: Secretary
Movies.overview: Hoping to recover from her troubled past, a socially awkward woman becomes a secretary for an eccentric lawyer who is aroused by her obedience.

Movies.title: Breaking Wind
Movies.overview: This raunchy, irreverent parody of the Twilight Saga is filled with vain vampires, horny werewolves, and plenty of paranormal hijinks.

Movies.title: Hostel
Movies.overview: Two Americans backpacking through Europe are lured to a particular hostel where they find themselves in a sinister situation where they may not survive.

Movies.title: My Little Pony: The Movie
Movies.overview: After a dark force conquers Canterlot, the Mane 6 embark on an unforgettable journey beyond Equestria where they meet new friends and exciting challenges on a quest to use the magic of friendship to save their homeland.

Movies.title: The Substitute 2: School's Out
Movies.overview: In this sequel, a substitute teacher hunts down the members of the vicious New York City gang who killed his brother.

Movies.title: Night Patrol
Movies.overview: Good-hearted but inept cop Melvin moonlights as a stand-up comedian. Billing himself as "The Unknown Comic," he wears a bag over his head to boost his courage and protect his career on the police force. Melvin is already having enough trouble maintaining his "double identity" when a joke-cracking thief commits a series of crimes while wearing Melvin's trademark bag over his head. Now, "The Unknown Comic" is the chief suspect, so Melvin has to find the real robber, fast ... before he ends up behind bars!

Movies.title: Armed Response
Movies.overview: Trapped inside a military compound after its AI malfunctions, a team of highly trained operatives begins to encounter bizarre and horrific phenomena.

Movies.title: Highlander
Movies.overview: A murdered 1536 Scottish swordsman is reborn in 1986 New York City to duel other immortals in a cosmic game that will leave only one with his head.

Movies.title: Frozen
Movies.overview: A final run on the slopes leaves three friends stuck on a stalled chairlift 100+ feet in the air as the resort closes for the week ahead of a storm.

Movies.title: I Spit on Your Grave 2
Movies.overview: After suffering through unspeakable horror at the hands of three men, a young model seeks a violent revenge on the people who attacked her.

Movies.title: The Haunting in Connecticut
Movies.overview: After a family is forced to relocate for their son's health, they begin experiencing supernatural behavior in their new home, which turns out to be a former mortuary.

Movies.title: The Boy in the Woods
Movies.overview: Fleeing from the Nazis who captured his family, 12-year-old Max hides and learns to survive during the war in the forests of occupied Eastern Europe.

Movies.title: Bait Shop
Movies.overview: Small-town fisherman Bill enters an annual bass tournament against his loud-mouthed rival in order to win the $15,000 he needs to save his bait shop.

Movies.title: Run
Movies.overview: As Europe faces a surge of migration, smugglers, police, locals, and tourists are drawn into a dangerous web of survival, sacrifice, and shifting loyalties.

Movies.title: We Are What We Are
Movies.overview: Behind closed doors, the ancient customs of a seemingly wholesome family are threatened with exposure when authorities begin unearthing grisly clues.

Movies.title: Maximum Conviction
Movies.overview: Two former special operatives are assigned to decommission a prison, but when mercenaries attack, they must protect two female inmates.

Movies.title: Emma.
Movies.overview: Beautiful, smart and wealthy, Emma Woodhouse navigates her way through misguided matches, romantic missteps and the challenges of growing up.

Movies.title: Marshmallow
Movies.overview: A 12-year-old boy starts to see a shadowy figure in the woods after hearing a spooky story at summer camp.

Movies.title: Jay and Silent Bob Reboot
Movies.overview: After inadvertently signing away the rights to their names, Jay and Silent Bob return to Hollywood to stop a reboot of a movie from getting made.

Movies.title: Instructions Not Included
Movies.overview: Un hombre sin orden en su vida, asume el cuidado de una bebé producto de una noche. Debe asumir la reponsabilidad más grande: la paternidad. Todo marcha bien hasta que debe pelear por la custodia de su hija ocultando un importante secreto.

Movies.title: Red Shoes and the Seven Dwarfs
Movies.overview: In this outrageous fairytale spoof, seven bold princes seek a kiss from Snow White to break the curse that has turned them into dwarfs.

Movies.title: Ellie
Movies.overview: After witnessing her evil stepmother and her three lecherous sons murder her father, Ellie plots to do them in with the only weapon she has: her body.

Movies.title: Mac & Devin Go to High School
Movies.overview: In their senior year, two high school kids, an overachiever working on his valedictory speech, and a stoner who may never graduate, find new paths.

Movies.title: When I'm Ready
Movies.overview: It's the end of the world. Seeking meaning and thrills in their last days alive, Rose and Michael embark on a cross-country road trip as a devastating asteroid threatens to wipe out life on Earth. On their journey they meet a cast of characters including shotgun wielding hermits, delinquent partyers, a thoughtful loner and, eventually, Rose's grandmother.

Movies.title: Secrets
Movies.overview: After having an affair, a successful businessman struggles to pick up the pieces for the good of his family while more secrets come to light.

Movies.title: Margin Call
Movies.overview: When an entry-level analyst unlocks information that could prove his firm's downfall, his co-workers are forced to choose between money and morality.

Movies.title: Rogue
Movies.overview: While taking a river cruise in the Northern Territory, a group of tourists get trapped on a rapidly flooding mud island after their boat is rammed by a huge saltwater crocodile, which proceeds to stalk them in a terrifying fight for survival.

Movies.title: Dolittle
Movies.overview: Robert Downey Jr. electrifies as the man who could talk to animals: Dolittle. After losing his wife, he hermits himself away behind the high wall of his manor, but is forced to set sail on an epic adventure when the queen falls gravely ill.

Movies.title: Blood Star
Movies.overview: A young Latina petty thief driving through New Mexico finds herself the target of a psychopathic small town sheriff who views his badge as a license to prey on vulnerable young women. She must use all of her street-smarts to survive.

Movies.title: Paradise Highway
Movies.overview: Academy Award® winners Juliette Binoche and Morgan Freeman lead this riveting thriller set in the trucking industry and its seamy underbelly of human trafficking. To save the life of her brother (Frank Grillo), Sally (Binoche), a truck driver, reluctantly agrees to smuggle illicit cargo: a girl named Leila (Hala Finley). As Sally and Leila begin a danger-fraught journey across state lines, a dogged FBI operative (Freeman) sets out on their trail, determined to do whatever it takes to terminate a human-trafficking operation — and bring Sally and Leila to safety.

Movies.title: Beyond a Reasonable Doubt
Movies.overview: An ambitious rookie journalist begins investigating a high-profile lawyer for tampering with evidence to secure his convictions.

Movies.title: Conan the Barbarian
Movies.overview: Conan (Jason Momoa) realizes he is the only hope of saving the great nations of Hyboria from an encroaching reign of supernatural evil, in an epic battle against hulking rivals, horrific monsters, and impossible odds.

Movies.title: I Can Do Bad All By Myself
Movies.overview: A nightclub singer's life — and heart — begin to change when her sister's kids and a kind boarder come to live with her, and challenge her in new ways.

Movies.title: The Legend of Hercules
Movies.overview: Hercules harnesses his demi-god powers to rise up against a corrupt king in this action-filled epic.

Movies.title: Midway
Movies.overview: Based on real events, this is the story of the leaders and soldiers who used their instincts, fortitude and bravery to overcome the odds in the Battle of Midway between the US Navy and the Imperial Japanese Navy, a pivotal turning point in WWII.

Movies.title: Belly
Movies.overview: A kingdom built by two crime lords and longtime friends crumbles when one joins Black Muslim group and the other gets a tempting deal from the cops.

Movies.title: Acts of Violence
Movies.overview: When the fiancée of one of three Midwestern brothers is kidnapped by human traffickers, the brothers must face a crime lord and an incorruptible police officer in order to save her life.

Movies.title: The Mothman Prophecies
Movies.overview: A reporter (Richard Gere) is drawn to a small West Virginia town to investigate a series of strange events, including psychic visions and the appearance of bizarre entities.

Movies.title: Criminal
Movies.overview: In a last-ditch effort to stop a diabolical plot, a dead CIA operative’s memories, secrets, and skills are implanted into an unpredictable and dangerous death-row inmate in hopes that he will complete the operative’s mission

Movies.title: Down River
Movies.overview: In the coal-mining mountains of West Virginia, a sheriff and his deputy probe a farmhouse crime. As secrets surface and clues twist, the investigation threatens not only the town's safety-but the sheriff's sanity.

Movies.title: Abduction
Movies.overview: For as long as he can remember, Nathan (Taylor Lautner) has had the uneasy feeling that he's living someone else's life. When he stumbles upon an image of himself as a little boy on a missing persons website, all of Nathan's darkest fears come true.

Movies.title: My Baby, Psychosis and Me
Movies.overview: An emotional portrait of the frightening journey undertaken by two mothers who experience postpartum psychosis after giving birth.

Movies.title: Now You See Me: Now You Don't
Movies.overview: The Four Horsemen and a new generation of illusionists join forces to steal the world's largest diamond from a South African mogul who heads an international crime syndicate.

Movies.title: Not Without Hope
Movies.overview: Based on the incredible true story. After their fishing boat capsizes off the coast of Mexico, a group of friends are left alone stranded at sea and struggling for survival.

Movies.title: Wish You Were Here
Movies.overview: At only 16 years old, British actress Emily Lloyd made a smashing debut with this coming-of-age comedy-drama about a flamboyant, sexually promiscuous teen who stirs moral outrage in her small seaside town of the 1950s with her unapologetically libertine behavior, even becoming pregnant with an older man's baby - all while pining for her late mother. Tom Bell, Clare Clifford, Barbara Durkin and ...

Movies.title: Theater Camp
Movies.overview: Eccentric staff members of an upstate New York theater camp must band together when their beloved founder falls into a coma.

Movies.title: House of the Rising Sun
Movies.overview: The chief suspect for a robbery and murder must uncover the truth about the crime and identify the real culprit before he is sent back to prison.

Movies.title: Her Deadly Sugar Daddy
Movies.overview: Después de graduarse de la universidad, Bridget se muda a una nueva ciudad con su mejor amiga Lindsay. Acepta un trabajo como asistente ejecutiva de un rico hombre de negocios, pero pronto aprenderá que una vida de lujo puede tener un precio mortal.

Movies.title: The Incredible Hulk Returns
Movies.overview: Mere mortals don’t stand a chance against their combined fury. Not the corrupt military man, Le Beau, who will resort to theft, murder, and kidnapping to obtain a top-secret Gamma Ray transponder. Not the longtime Hulk-hunter Jack McGee (Jack Colvin), whose obsession with stopping the Hulk verges on madness. Not even the good intentions of David Banner (Bill Bixby), who only wants to rid himself of his furious alter ego. For when the two awesome superheroes stop feuding long enough to breathe, they are a team unmatched by any in fact or fiction. And when THE INCREDIBLE HULK RETURNS – he does with a vengeance!

Movies.title: Hell Comes to Frogtown
Movies.overview: In a post-apocalyptic world dominated by mutant humanoid frogs, the survival of the human race falls on women finding the few remaining fertile men.

Movies.title: Rogue
Movies.overview: Megan Fox (TRANSFORMERS) plays a battle-hardened mercenary in the wilds of Africa whose team must not only survive against a gang of murderous rebels they rescued hostages from, but a pack of bloodthirsty lions they encounter.

Movies.title: Couple Friendly
Movies.overview: Couple Friendly follows the journey of a Telugu boy and girl who both reside in Chennai. Their paths cross under unique circumstances, and the story deals with the challenges they face in their careers and relationship. Set in a city where they don't speak their mother tongue, the film explores the emotional highs and lows of navigating life and love in an unfamiliar environment.

Movies.title: Roofman
Movies.overview: The story of the rooftop robber, Jeffrey Manchester, and his time on the lam evading capture.

Movies.title: The Prophecy
Movies.overview: Un ex seminarista y detective de homicidios queda envuelto en una guerra entre ángeles y demonios que se librará aquí en la Tierra.

Movies.title: The Cranes Are Flying
Movies.overview: This landmark film by the virtuosic Mikhail Kalatozov was heralded as a revelation in the post-Stalin Soviet Union and the international cinema community alike. It tells the story of Veronica (Tatiana Samoilova) and Boris (Alexei Batalov), a couple who are blissfully in love until World War II tears them apart. With Boris at the front, Veronica must try to ward off spiritual numbness and defend herself from the increasingly forceful advances of her beau’s draft-dodging cousin. Winner of the Palme d’Or at the 1958 Cannes Film Festival, THE CRANES ARE FLYING is a superbly crafted drama with impassioned performances and viscerally emotional, gravity-defying cinematography by Kalatozov’s regular collaborator Sergei Urusevsky.

Movies.title: The Body
Movies.overview: Álex Villaverde panics when his wife’s body disappears from the morgue and the ensuing search and investigation threaten to reveal him as her killer.

Movies.title: The Healer
Movies.overview: With the help of a teenage girl with terminal cancer, Alec Bailey learns to embrace and put to use his family’s mysterious gift of healing people.

Movies.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II
Movies.overview: John Rambo is offered the chance to cut short his prison tenure by going on a secret mission for the US government deep into the jungles of Vietnam and locating American POWs.

Movies.title: Rambo III
Movies.overview: Rambo has withdrawn to a Buddhist monastery in Thailand where he found peace and serenity. His mentor Colonel Trautman asks him to help carry out a dangerous mission in Afghanistan, but he refuses. Trautman attempts it alone but is captured and harshly interrogated. The CIA can do nothing and call upon Rambo. Rambo chooses his weapons, binds his muscles and hits his enemies like a hurricane.

Movies.title: The Longest Yard
Movies.overview: A disgraced quarterback rallies his fellow inmates for a rough game of football against the prison guards, all under the watch of a corrupt warden.

Movies.title: The SpongeBob SquarePants Movie
Movies.overview: He’s the wacky underwater star of an ocean full of adventures – he’s SpongeBob SquarePants! In his original movie debut, SpongeBob takes leave from the town of Bikini Bottom in order to track down King Neptune's stolen crown.

Movies.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge Out of Water
Movies.overview: When a diabolical pirate above the sea steals the secret Krabby Patty formula, SpongeBob and his pals must embark on a mission to get it back - in their most super-heroic adventure yet!

Movies.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
Movies.overview: The Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles are bigger and better than ever in this blockbuster hit loaded with nonstop action and laughs! When New York City is in trouble, it's up to these four ninja-fighting, pizza-loving brothers to save it.

Movies.title: El Gringo
Movies.overview: Un hombre ingresa a México con una bolsa de dos millones en efectivo y se enfrenta a repentinos ataques de policías corruptos y mafiosos.

Movies.title: White Vengeance
Movies.overview: Liu Bang (Leon Lai) and Xiang Yu (Shaofeng Feng), brothers in battle, fight for supremacy during the fall of the Qin Dynasty.
In early 20th century China, a decorated Army general educated in modern warfare returns from a stay in Japan to unite his splintering country.

Movies.title: Escape from Germany
Movies.overview: On the eve of Hitler's invasion of Poland, a group of American LDS missionaries race to escape Nazi Germany. Based on a harrowing true story.

Movies.title: War Pigs
Movies.overview: A rag tag unit of misfits known as the War Pigs must go behind enemy lines to exterminate Nazis by any means necessary.

Movies.title: Von Richthofen and Brown
Movies.overview: The story of two WWI pilots: a gentlemanly German and a devil-may-care Canadian. The two take to the skies to face off in the ultimate dogfight.

Movies.title: Warhorse One
Movies.overview: A Navy SEAL master chief takes on the brutal Afghan wilderness when he must guide a child to safety through a gauntlet of Taliban insurgents.

Movies.title: A War
Movies.overview: A Danish Commander is accused of a civil murder in Afghanistan. Meanwhile, his family back home gets caught up in dangerous turmoil.

Movies.title: Whiskey Tango Foxtrot
Movies.overview: Set in 2002, a journalist wanting to shake things up leaves her safe desk job in New York and takes a dangerous reporting assignment in Afghanistan.

Movies.title: Patriot Games
Movies.overview: After foiling a terrorist plot against the British royal family, retired CIA analyst Jack Ryan returns to the agency when his family comes under attack.

Movies.title: Clear and Present Danger
Movies.overview: When his mentor Admiral James Greer becomes ill, Ryan is appointed acting CIA Director of Intelligence. He now must investigate the murder of one of the President’s friends, a prominent U.S. businessman with secret ties to Colombian drug cartels.

Movies.title: Best Defense
Movies.overview: A military engineer discovers secret blueprints that could make his company's tank a success - but can he fix the bugs before the weapon gets used?

Movies.title: The Last Castle
Movies.overview: His service to his country made him a hero. One mistake made him a prisoner. For General Eugene Irwin (Redford), It's just a matter of serving out his sentance - until he makes the shocking discovery that his fellow inmates are being murdered.

Movies.title: Defiance
Movies.overview: Based on a true story, during World War II, four Jewish brothers escape their Nazi-occupied homeland of West Belarus in Poland and join the Soviet partisans to combat the Nazis. The brothers begin the rescue of roughly 1,200 Jews still in Poland.

Movies.title: Hell Is for Heroes
Movies.overview: It’s 1944, and Nazi forces along the Siegfried Line have the numbers, the fortifications and the firepower to break through. GIs have little more than a dogged determination and the ingenuity to fool the Germans into thinking they are allies.

Movies.title: Flight of the Intruder
Movies.overview: Here comes an explosive wartime adventure with spectacular aerial action. Pilot Jake Grafton, a disillusioned young renegade looking for payback hires a hell bent bombardier to go on an unauthorized mission behind enemy lines.

Movies.title: The Hunt for Red October
Movies.overview: A new technologically-superior Soviet nuclear sub is heading for the U.S. coast; however, one CIA analyst (Alec Baldwin) thinks the captain (Sean Connery) will defect the submarine and he only has hours to prove it.

Movies.title: Sands of Iwo Jima
Movies.overview: Tough-as-nails career Marine Sergeant John Stryker is greatly disliked by the men of his squad, particularly the combat replacements, for the rigorous training he puts them through.

Movies.title: Flags of Our Fathers
Movies.overview: February 1945. Even as victory in Europe was finally within reach, the war in the Pacific raged on. One of the most crucial and bloodiest battles of the war was the struggle for the island of Iwo Jima, which culminated with what would become one of the most iconic images in history.

Movies.title: Bones and All
Movies.overview: In a world that cannot abide who they truly are, a young woman who is learning how to survive on the margins of society and an intense, disenfranchised drifter embark upon a road trip, searching for identity and chasing beauty in a perilous world.

Movies.title: David Lynch: The Art Life
Movies.overview: The life and career of iconic director David Lynch are explored through more than 20 conversations recorded with him at his home.

Movies.title: Zodiac
Movies.overview: There's more than one way to lose your life to a killer. The hunt is on for a serial killer in San Francisco. Few cases in the history of true crime are as intriguing as that of Zodiac, a bizarre gunman in an executioner's hood, who taunts the police with dozens of letters containing eerie messages and cryptograms.

Movies.title: Sabrina
Movies.overview: The daughter of the family chauffeur is sought after by two wealthy socialite brothers.

Movies.title: Bottle Rocket
Movies.overview: Three best friends attempt to escape suburban boredom by embarking on a life of crime. They're just not very good at it.

Movies.title: Black Dynamite
Movies.overview: When "The Man" murders his brother, pumps heroin into local orphanages, and floods the ghetto with adulterated malt liquor, Black Dynamite is the one hero willing to fight all the way from the blood-soaked city streets to the hallowed halls of the Honky House. Michael Jai White (Blood and Bone) stars as Black Dynamite, a gun-toting, nunchuk-wielding, ladies man and soul brother.

Movies.title: Arrival
Movies.overview: When a mysterious alien spaceship lands on Earth, an expert linguist is recruited by the military to decipher their language and figure out whether they come in peace or are a threat.

Movies.title: Attack the Block
Movies.overview: A gang of teenagers faces an invasion of ferocious aliens.

Movies.title: Clue
Movies.overview: Six colorful dinner guests gather at the mansion of their host — who turns up dead after his scheme to blackmail them is exposed.

Movies.title: Eddie Murphy Raw
Movies.overview: Recorded in front of a live audience in New York City, this film features actor/comedian Eddie Murphy performing a scathing comedy routine.

Movies.title: Martin Lawrence Live: Runteldat
Movies.overview: Box office star and hit comedian Martin Lawrence returns to his roots in this live stand-up show that sees him bring his unique brand of cynical humour to the stage.

Movies.title: Scream VI
Movies.overview: The four survivors from the most recent Woodsboro Ghostface killings have moved to New York City for a fresh start. Just as they begin to feel a sense of normalcy, they receive that infamous call. Ghostface is more brutal and relentless than ever and will stop at nothing to hunt them down.

Movies.title: Scream 3
Movies.overview: While Sidney Prescott lives in safely guarded seclusion, bodies begin dropping around the Hollywood set of Stab 3, the latest movie based on the gruesome Woodsboro killings.

Movies.title: The Bad Guardian
Movies.overview: A dedicated daughter must find the strength to save her father from the clutches of a corrupt and greedy court-appointed "guardian.”

Movies.title: There's Something About Mary
Movies.overview: A man reunites with his dream girl, even though their past was a disaster.

Movies.title: The Plastic Detox
Movies.overview: This eye-opening documentary follows six couples with unexplained infertility as they lower their exposure to plastics in hopes it helps them conceive.

Movies.title: There There
Movies.overview: Through fleeting connection and confronting isolation, seven people search for meaning in their modern, intertwining relationships.

Movies.title: Vengeance
Movies.overview: A journalist travels from New York City to West Texas to investigate his ex-girlfriend’s death while recording a murder mystery podcast along the way.

Movies.title: A Journal for Jordan
Movies.overview: 1st Sgt. Charles Monroe King, before he is killed in action in Baghdad, authors a journal for his son intended to tell him how to live a decent life despite growing up without a father. Based on a true story.

Movies.title: Good Savage
Movies.overview: Jesse y Maggie, artistas en busca de inspiración, se mudan a un remoto pueblo mexicano y conocen a Melitón, un encantador estafador, hasta que ficción y realidad comienzan a confundirse peligrosamente.

Movies.title: Point Break
Movies.overview: An FBI agent is lured by the thrill of the deep when he goes undercover to catch a band of surfers who rob banks to fund their addiction to danger.

Movies.title: Sugar Kisses
Movies.overview: Nacho falls for Mayra, the daughter of a vicious gang leader. When the two youngsters begin their relationship, they discover the pains of adulthood.

Movies.title: Chilangolandia
Movies.overview: Todos buscan una bolsa desaparecida con millones de pesos en la caótica Ciudad de México, el lugar donde todo puede suceder.

Movies.title: A Husband to Die For: The Lisa Aguilar Story
Movies.overview: Lisa is viciously attacked in her own home, and she and her unborn baby are left for dead. Lisa miraculously survives and begins to unravel a horrifying truth: the man she trusted most may have tried to kill her.

Movies.title: Fight Club
Movies.overview: A detached man and his friend organize brutal, bare-knuckle boxing matches.

Movies.title: BlackBerry
Movies.overview: The riveting true story of the meteoric rise and catastrophic demise of the world's first smartphone, BlackBerry is a whirlwind ride through the ruthlessly competitive forces of Silicon Valley at breakneck speeds.

Movies.title: Gaslit by My Husband: The Morgan Metzer Story
Movies.overview: A woman's ex-husband shows up minutes after a masked intruder has assaulted her in her home. His answers to the authorities don't seem to add up, which makes him the prime suspect in the attack.

Movies.title: Angel On The Clock
Movies.overview: Una niña enferma desea detener el tiempo, pero este deseo la llevará a una aventura transicional.

Movies.title: 1938: When Mexico Recovered Its Oil
Movies.overview: En 1938, Lázaro Cárdenas enfrenta el reto de expropiar la industria petrolera. El filme retrata tensiones entre gobierno, compañías y pueblo, mostrando la unidad nacional que marcó el rumbo de México.
